Title: ASOS Ignored Evidence, Refused Assistance, and Left Me Without My £180 Refund
Text: ASOS refused to take responsibility for a £180 return even after InPost confirmed a system issue I have been a regular ASOS customer, but the way ASOS handled my return issue has been completely unacceptable. I placed my ASOS return parcel into an InPost locker on 18 April 2026 at BEDWELL CRES, Stevenage, SG1 1NA. The parcel contained items worth approximately £180. After placing the parcel in the locker, I never received a collection confirmation or proper tracking update. I contacted InPost and was told that there was an issue with the locker/system. InPost also stated in writing that there were issues with my parcel entering their systems correctly and specifically told me to report the problem to ASOS so ASOS could raise it with InPost on my behalf and work together to resolve it. I provided this information to ASOS. I explained repeatedly that the parcel was physically stuck inside the locker, that the locker was not working, that I had no access to the parcel, and that InPost had directed me back to ASOS. I also provided the locker location, the date of drop-off, the return details, and a photo of the locker. Despite all of this, ASOS refused to take ownership of the issue. Their response was essentially that they could not “just take my word without proof” and that I needed InPost to confirm the drop-off. But I had already shown them InPost’s own message confirming there were system issues and asking ASOS to raise the matter with them. ASOS then told me that the issue was “not handled by ASOS” and that I needed to deal directly with the carrier. This is exactly the problem: InPost kept sending me back to ASOS, and ASOS kept sending me back to InPost. I was trapped between two companies, while my return parcel remained inaccessible and my £180 refund was withheld. This is not acceptable customer service. ASOS generated the return, ASOS instructed the return process, and InPost specifically told me ASOS needed to raise the issue with them. Instead of helping, ASOS dismissed the situation and left me to chase the carrier myself. I have been waiting since 18 April with no refund, no clear resolution, and no proper support. ASOS should not abandon customers when a return arranged through their process fails because of a locker/carrier system issue. Extremely disappointing, stressful, and irresponsible handling of a genuine return problem.

Title: I am extremely disappointed with my…
Text: I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience with ASOS, which managed to go wrong at every stage of the process. For my birthday, I purchased a pair of shoes originally priced at £140. I used my birthday discount code, which reduced the price to £112, and then paid the full remaining balance using a gift card. The first issue occurred when the package arrived. The shoe box was in an incredibly poor condition, heavily damaged and worn. I immediately contacted customer service to report this. After trying on the shoes, I discovered that they were too small. I had ordered my usual size because ASOS listed the item as “true to size” and recommended ordering my regular size. Since the sizing advice was inaccurate, I requested an exchange for a UK 10.5. The exchange process appeared to be completed successfully, and ASOS even informed me that the replacement pair would be delivered on 13 June. I received the return confirmation email and promptly sent the shoes back using the provided return code. The returned shoes arrived at the warehouse yesterday, but I received no update regarding the exchange. This made me suspicious, so I contacted customer service on 11 June. To my surprise, I was told that ASOS’s system had failed to process my exchange request and that I would instead receive a refund back to my gift card. I explained that the exchange had failed due to an issue with THEIR system, not because of any action on my part, and that they should honour the exchange request. Unfortunately, no effort was made to resolve the problem. Since the exchange could not be completed, I at least requested that my birthday discount code be reinstated so I could reorder the shoes at the same price I originally paid. Without the code, I would have to pay the full £140. Customer service provided me with another code, but that code does not work on this item and cannot be used together with gift card payments. When I contacted them again, I was simply told that nothing more could be done. As a result, I am now being forced to pay £140 for a pair of shoes that I originally purchased for £112, entirely because of ASOS’s mistakes. This order has disappointed me three separate times: 1. The shoes arrived in a severely damaged box. 2. ASOS’s system failed to process my exchange request despite confirming it. 3. The replacement discount code provided by customer service does not work. The customer service was completely unhelpful throughout the entire process, and no reasonable solution was offered. I have been a customer for a long time, but this experience has completely destroyed my trust in ASOS.Terrible customer service, terrible systems, and an overall terrible customer experience. I will never shop with ASOS again.

Title: First time customer to this site, order issues
Text: First time customer to this site. Bought a black jumpsuit, US size 12, received a 16. I contacted customer serivce to report the wrong size and asked for them not to charge me for the return since the error was on their end. They replied that since I ordered a 16, they would not be able to provide free shipping. In the meantime, I placed a second order, again for a US size 12, and paid for Fedex 3-day shipping, as I originally ordered the jumpsuit to wear to a business conference. On the day I was supposed to receive the order, I checked the tracking, and the order was stuck in customs in Dallas. It remained stuck there for 5 days. Needless to say, I did not receive the order in time.  When the order finally arrived, it was the wrong size, AGAIN.  So now I am returning this item again. I have placed the order for a third and final time. It is a nice jumpsuit and exactly what I am looking for, so that is why I keep trying. I hope the 3rd time is the charm. What I think the issue is is that they have UK and US sizing, and someone at the warehouse keeps messing up or their labeling systems are not accurate.

Title: Years of Loyalty, Deeply Disappointing Experience
Text: I have been an ASOS customer for years, but my  experience has been increasingly disappointing in the past few months. ASOS recently informed customers in Ireland that Next Day Delivery is no longer available and that customers wishing to receive a refund for their Premier Delivery subscription must contact customer service. However, the email provided no contact details despite requiring customers to get in touch. ASOS no longer provides a customer service email address or phone number, leaving Live Chat as the only way to contact them. I spent over an hour on chat trying to discuss a refund for a service that ASOS has acknowledged it can no longer provide. I was told I would receive an email confirmation regarding my refund request, but no email was ever received. I was also unable to obtain any timeframe for a response to my complaint. To make matters worse, I had previously reported issues with the Next Day Delivery service and was told nothing could be done. It now appears those issues were part of a wider problem affecting customers in Ireland. The website experience has also deteriorated significantly. Items frequently appear to be available, only to disappear and show as unavailable when selected. My biggest disappointment is not the removal of Next Day Delivery itself, but the way ASOS has handled communication, refunds and customer support. Customers should not have to spend hours chasing refunds for services that are no longer being provided.

Title: Dealing with ASOS customer service is…
Text: Dealing with ASOS customer service is excruciating. I asked for a refund on ASOS Premier, as it isn't explained that it doesn't cover brand partners during the sign-up process. I didn't use the service and asked for a refund within 30 minutes under the cooling off terms in the Consumer Rights Act. They initially refused. I asked to log a complaint and they continued to stall until eventually agreeing to the refund. They promised I'd receive an email confirmation shortly afterward but heard nothing since.

Title: The worst customer service I have ever…
Text: The worst customer service I have ever received when trying to make a return. I tried to make a return for several items, the system would not let me - first it said it worked then I never received a QR code, then I tried again and it said there were too many items, then I tried again and it only gave me the option for the return to be collected rather than dropped off. I tried to speak to the customer service online chat. The AI assistant asked me 5 times whether I wanted to speak to an agent, which I replied yes every time. Once I was finally through to an agent named Eric Disilva, this person was incredibly unhelpful and slow. He did not listen to the issue and just went ahead and created three InPost returns and said it was important that specific items went with specific returns. It took him over an hour to do this. I did not have any clarity over which items were meant to go with which return. I asked him for a confirmation email of the items that he had selected to be returned and his response was I'll get an automatic email sent at some point, but do not wait for this and just send the parcels off. He then ended the chat without anything being resolved. I will never use asos again. I will never recommend it to anyone. I understand they are trying to reduce the amount that people are returning, but they have now made it impossible to return and have the worst customer service.

Title: I think even 1 star is too generous…
Text: I think even 1 star is too generous for the absolute joke that ASOS has become. I’ve been shopping on there for years now and never had any problems, but clearly they’re so financially screwed right now that they’ve just taken to scamming money from their customers. Ordered a Playsuit from them at the end of May, however when I tried it on the straps were way too short and not adjustable. I couldn’t even get it up. Don’t even get me started on the fact that they lie about their models heights making it extremely difficult to judge if things will fit. Either way I placed a return for this item only to receive an email stating that my return had been rejected. The reasons they stated were that the item was returned in a used and unsuitable condition which is absolutely ridiculous considering it was out of the bag less than 5 minutes. Just to be clear, the label was not removed and it was sent back in the exact bag it was sent in. Crazy, because if they deem the item used and unsuitable, that means it was sent out to me that way and they clearly don’t care about quality checks on clothing. Personally I think the item was in pristine condition and they’re just trying to money grab where they can at this point. I also want to clear up that I’m not a serial returner, I don’t ever order multiple sizes or even place huge orders in general. In fact my return rate is at 25% and I don’t often have issues. What’s really got to me about this whole situation is the lack of customer service or care. I managed to get in touch with a customer service agent on Sunday morning, who was the most unhelpful, unsympathetic person I’ve ever dealt with. He claimed he was escalating the situation and that I’d hear back about the outcome in no less than 24 hours and I’m yet to hear back. I’ve now been sat in the chat again since yesterday morning, going round in circles with an AI bot, waiting to be connected to an agent. Clearly shopping here isn’t worth the hassle anymore and I’ll be deleting my account with them.

Title: I've been really disappointed with ASOS…
Text: I've been really disappointed with ASOS lately. Customer service is lacking and getting help when there’s an issue can be frustrating and time-consuming. The quality and overall product range seem to have gone downhill significantly compared to previous years. It’s become much harder to find anything decent, and many items feel overpriced for what you actually receive. The website still offers a large selection, but sorting through it to find good-quality pieces is increasingly difficult. What used to be a go-to retailer now feels inconsistent and unreliable. When problems arise, customer support often falls short of expectations, making the experience even more disappointing. Overall, ASOS is not the retailer it once was. Between the decline in product quality and the poor customer service, I find it hard to recommend shopping there these days.

Title: Poor quality and customer service
Text: I have been a customer of Rapanui for several years but unfortunately I will not be purchasing from them again. I purchased several pairs of men's boxers which all came unstitched on the same seam. The items were not good quality and they did not last as long as other organic boxers I have purchased previously and, as an eco-conscious  customer, I am mindful that the durability of an item forms a considerable part of its overall sustainability. Customer services refunded me for one pair of the boxers but this does not address my concerns about the quality of the product. I was also disappointed with the customer service I received. There is no direct contact number and, after submitting an enquiry, I was emailed with a ticket number and had to wait several days for a response. On replying to the response given, I was then issued a new ticket number rather than being able to reply to the customer service advisor I had been dealing with and I have not received any further communication. My overall experience was very disappointing.

Text: I bought a faux leather coat. When the item arrived I was happy with the style and quality. Part of the design feature of the coat was the leather straps around the wrist part. One of them was missing. After days emailing over and back they decided they would refund me 50% of the cost. I didn't request any refund I wanted the strap but they said they wouldn't send me the strap and basically just accept the partial refund or send it back for a full refund. The coat is really no good to me without the design feature which caused me to choose it in the first place. Very disappointing

Title: (surfing towels) lovely
Text: (surfing towels) lovely, thick quality and generous size. colours are gorgeous. Not cheap - quality justifies this Customer service really quick and helpful

Title: Horrible...
Text: Horrible customer service.... no better way to put it, simply Horrible

Title: Extremely disappointing experience.
Text: Extremely disappointing experience. I placed an order that was supposed to arrive before an upcoming trip. After the delivery date passed, I was told it would arrive a few days later. Then I was told it never even left the warehouse. I requested a replacement, but ASOS took so long to process it that the items went out of stock and my order was ultimately canceled and refunded. At the same time, my second order was also delayed and won’t arrive before my trip either. The worst part was customer support. After multiple chats and repeated requests for a supervisor, I spent hours getting the same scripted responses over and over. The agent didn’t seem to understand the issue and kept claiming a replacement was being processed when the order had already been canceled. I’ve been a loyal customer for over 10 years, but this experience showed a complete lack of urgency, accountability, and customer care.

Title: Pathetic packaging items arrived damaged
Text: I ordered three body moisturisers from boo-hoo they arrived completely smashed which is not a surprise because if you put three large plastic items literally just in a plastic bag and expect it to get through the post it’s not going to arrive in perfect condition. I am so upset I paid over £82 for these products and they are fit for the bin now if I do not get a full refund or exchange I will take matter as much further. I do not recommend this company. They do not have a telephone number to call them and I cannot see anywhere where I can contact them. It’s beyond PATHETIC!!!

Title: Order three tops all three were cr*p
Text: Order three tops all three were cr*p. Cheap material and just ugly. $15 for postage for them to send then another $15 if you want to return. Don’t waste your money.

Title: My order didn't arrive - no replacement
Text: My order didn't arrive. Customer services said they'd resent it, it still didn't arrive. Unsatisfactory replies from very slow customer services. 3.5 weeks onwards & I still don't have the item or a sensible answer.

Title: Unwanted notifications
Text: Why do you keep sending me notifications that I have neither requested nor signed up for? In my settings, I have only allowed notifications regarding items being in stock. Yet you keep spamming me with ads.

Title: Fast delivery & easy returns process
Text: Fast delivery & easy returns process : )

Title: Item not sent from misguided
Text: Item not sent from misguided, it was sent from some random warehouse in china, item stitching broken and it’s asking me to pay for a return? Absolutely disgusting. Nobody will get back to me or help me. Totally unacceptable behaviour.

Title: Damaged Shoes Received
Text: Ordered a pair of shoes for a special occasion. Shoes had come apart on the cushioned sole, on both shoes. They were obviously dispatched like this, where is the quality control?. I have sent back for a full refund. But I wanted to speak with customer service because I was so disappointed. They did not offer a discount or any compensation. I would not use again. Very poor.

Title: Absolutely terrible customer service
Text: Absolutely terrible customer service, taken money from me, order wasnt placed, getting no where with AI ! As dont have an order number - cannot make contact with anyone to speak to them - just keep getting generic email reply. Terrible, certainly will not be ordering from them again!

Title: Poor customer service
Text: Poor customer service. I had to wait weeks for a refund and then they say they are going to deduct a £1.99 return fee. What a joke!! Won't be buying anything from them again!!

Title: Awful customer service
Text: Awful customer service! I won’t use this company for myself again. I ordered a selection of dresses for a wedding, one was delivered damaged. The ‘contact’ option is by a text message which takes hours to get a reply and then you often get swapped to another operator who knows nothing about the situation so you have to explain again. They tried to charge me delivery for a replacement of the damaged dress then kept my money which I was due for my returned items for over a month even though I had the tracking receipt from Royal Mail to confirm they’d had them back. I then logged a complaint on 2 separate occasions regarding the service and am still waiting for a reply. This was on 16th May!!!!!!!! Unacceptable……

Title: Money taken from my sons account
Text: Money taken from my sons account - no order number, no records in recent orders, Ai customer support. Still trying to get refund and getting no where.

Title: Nice garment, but...
Text: The 2 hooded fleeces appear to be good quality and felt lovely and soft. The negatives were the time it took to receive the products (probably too used to quicker organisations) and the sizing. I am a size 14, so ordered medium. They were huge. Would easily fit 16plus with room to spare. However, I  liked the quality and colours so have ordered again,  but in small size.

Title: The quality of the clothes has not been…
Text: The quality of the clothes has not been satisfactory. The stitching for yellow trousers was part yellow, part black. There was a hole in my recent purchase and boohoo are not offering a refund, there is not the option to select faulty item on their portal to complete a return, their customer service asks the same questions again and again without resolving the issue. Would not recommend.

Title: If I could do ZERO stars I would.
Text: Be careful, I,ve had £2.99 delivery + added to my bill, told them I didn,t ask for it so why? No answer except its to make sure my parcel gets to me??? Like a kinda insurance, how thats meant to stop theft or disappearance of parcels god knows. Thought thats what I paid £3.99 delivery for . This company are adding on ££ that you,ve not asked for  so before you press that checkout button....CHECK DETAILS...They've had £2.99 delivery+ AND £3.99 delivery So even if you send all back, they still make money from people ... Fuming....almost £7 gone!! And a month waiting on a refund !! Lesson learnt, won't buy again If I could do zero stars I would.

Title: Kai was helpful and answered all my…
Text: Kai was helpful and answered all my questions about return process.

Title: My new favourite company
Text: My new favourite company. Saw the advert was a little sceptical about quality due to price of bundle but loved the story. I need bot have worried, love the feel  the weight of material and the fit. That added to the way they care for the planet means this won't be my last order. Summer is sorted now on to Autumn wardrobe!!! Thanks Davs

Title: Warning!
Text: Warning! I strongly advise against buying from Missguided, which is now owned by SHEIN (something I unfortunately was unaware of when placing my order). The clothes I received were in terrible condition and several items were faulty. I ended up spending both a significant amount of time and money trying to return the order. Not only did I never receive a refund, but I also had to pay for two separate return shipments because the return address provided by the company did not exist. Customer service was equally disappointing. After the initial response, my emails were essentially ignored, and no meaningful assistance was provided. At this point, I simply want to move on from this frustrating experience and accept the money I have lost due to this unprofessional company. I therefore requested that my account and personal data should be deleted in accordance with my rights under GDPR, but this request has also been ignored. Based on my experience, I would strongly recommend that others avoid both Missguided and SHEIN.

Title: Dont buy from them
Text: I bought two of the same dress so I could compare size. I did not receive a booking information email and the parcel came without any paperwork. One dress was marked and neither were suitable so I wanted to return these. You can only speak to a bot through Facebook messenger. It takes an age to get a response and when you respond it goes unanswered. Ive been asked for the same information I had already provided 4 times and still a week down the line I have had no answers, and stuck with 2 dresses one of which is marked. I had used boohoo previously but I will never use them again and strongly advise anyone not to use them. Customer service is terrible. Dresses are marked when they arrive. No purchasing information shared. No paperwork shared. Disgusting.

Title: As the tracking on my delivery app says…
Text: As the tracking on my delivery app says that it has been delivered, Kai reassured me that its still on its way and maybe a misscommunication between the delivery service and the boohoo app. Thank you Kai for following up my parcel.

Title: Struggled to get any information about…
Text: Struggled to get any information about my return and refund in the beginning, but then Theo got in touch and was sorted really fast thankfully. 5 stars for Theo

Title: Good quality clothing
Text: Good quality clothing. Had an issue with the delivery address and the customer service was excellent.

Title: I have had a good experience with Carson
Text: I have had a good experience with customer service with fast replies and then understanding my concerns, all of my refunds being processed and then being able to help me with enquiries was amazing. I had a day wait at the start that put me down a bit but the amazing response after made it better. Carson was great and easy to talk to and understood my enquiry.

Title: Cannot generate a return
Text: I am trying to generate a return. I then enter the returns portal, enter my details and my order is displayed. Once I select the item I want to return I am taken to a new page. My item is no longer displayed (missing as an option) and I cannot generate a return. I have sent numerous emails and I'm getting a generic response. If I could actually talk to a human they could easily rectify this and generate a return. I'm sure a response here will say send a message or include a reference number I have!

Title: Very bad from service point of view and…
Text: Very bad from service point of view and quality, they charge you for retour making it not attractive to order and even the shortage return amount you don’t get it! Very bad experience!

Title: Never will i order from this company…
Text: Never will i order from this company again. I ordered a bag on the boohoo website which took over a week to arrive. This was now too late. As I no longer needed it I raised a return to send it back. Was told to contact london aftershock as this was where the bag is actually from...After two further emails ...IT  then took a further week to receive the returns paperwork as its all paperless now. I sent the item back as soon as I received the paperwork. Over 3 weeks later im still emailing them as I have not received any refund. I was told by boohoo to contact aftershock london as the bag was from them via the boohoo website. London aftershock has now told me they have processed it so now I have to contact boohoo again to see where my refund is  !! Absolute farce .

Title: Customer service are great
Text: Customer service are great, very quick to respond and love the clothes. Especially the fleeces. Great there is a shop in Canterbury too

Title: The way this company treat their…
Text: The way this company treat their customers is disgusting! Be very wary when buying from these as when you check out it automatically adds their premium subscription to your basket and if like me, you do not realise to uncheck the box, you are charged £9.99. This is very misleading! Customer service refused to issue a refund despite it stating in their terms and conditions that you have a 14 day cooling off period to cancel the subscription. After telling them i was contacting the Retail ADR team and citizens advice they agreed to deactivate the subscription and said I would receive a refund within 5 days. I never received anything and the subscription is still running. Looks like I have a yearly subscrption for a service I will never use again!

Title: Incorrect item delivered (I paid extra…
Text: Incorrect item delivered (I paid extra for next day delivery). Tried contacting them via messenger, because that's the only option. And no reply in over 24 hours. I won't be using them again.

Title: Wrong sizes then no refund
Text: Ordered a 3 piece set in size S, one piece came as L, another XS and another S. No help from boohoo just told to return. Returned item and a month later still received no refund. Won’t be buying from boohoo again.

Title: AVOID!
Text: Ordered a bundle of clothes amounting to £200+, unfortunately most of the items were either poorly made or cheap horrible material and looked completely different to advertised. On returning them, boohoo failed to refund me for an item included in the return. So I have contacted their customer services multiple times, via text and messenger as is the only way, and they just keep asking for the same return number again and again and getting nowhere. Very frustrating process, shocking customer service, not giving my full refund and cheap poorly made clothing. AVOID!

Title: Ridiculous new refund method
Text: What has happened to Boohoo???? I placed an order worth £120, everything that arrived was a terrible fit and really poorly made so I decided to return. What boohoo hadn’t updated anyone with was the fact they’ve changed the refund process. There is a choice at the start to select gift card or refund to payment method, however, gift card is selected at a default. So if you aren’t expecting this, and click continue, you automatically select “gift card” as your refund method. Once this is selected, it cannot be changed which I think is an absolute scam. I then never received the gift card confirmation and asked for it to be resent. I then came to using it this week, where I asked for the gift card to be reissued and was told it had exceeded the 90 day limit!? Which I couldn’t have been aware of as I never received it in the first place. So now I am £120 short and customer service have been of no help or understanding.

Title: Horrible experience with disconnected…
Text: Horrible experience with disconnected customer service. I ordered pajamas for my wedding. 2 items I never received and I couldn’t reorder in time and in order to get a refund it took a 20 email thread with me providing the same information over and over again in order for the refund to be processed. The items I needed to return, I still haven’t been able to, once again they keep asking the same information over and over and I haven’t been able to send it back for over two weeks.and still no end in sight. The people you deal with are incompetent and it is so inconvenient I will definitely never be buying from them again. It shouldn’t be this hard to return items or get a refund when an error is made on their part.

Title: The worst customer service …
Text: I ordered something Express delivery with my premier account on 18th May 26. It’s now 2nd June 26 and it hasn’t turned up. The item has clearly been lost by Evri, but boohoo haven’t refunded me yet. You can only contact an AI and it keeps moving the date I need to wait until I get my refund. It makes you jump through hoops just to tell you, actually wait another few days then get back to us. After you wait that extra few days you get the same again. Your customer service isn’t just bad, it’s none existent. Give me my money back now!!!! I’ll contact trading standards and I’m never shopping with you again.

Title: Do not get a refund on a gift card. Customer Service is non existent
Text: Never get a refund on a gift card from Boohoo. If a problem arises they will not help you and you loose any money that was on that gift card. They do not explain the t&c’s when issuing gift card. Customer service is non existent. I was also overcharged for postage and did not receive a reply after many attempts to contact them. They do not even deserve 1 star!

Title: Rapanui Customer Service
Text: I contacted Rapanui Customer Service via a Facebook message and got a friendly and helpful reply to my enquiry.

Title: Next day delivery failure
Text: I’ve ordered a t-shirt as last minute birthday present and paid next day delivery. It’s been two days and still no sign of it. They haven’t responded to my question about the order since the morning. Order marked as at the depot with Evri therefore I have no hopes received it anytime soon as Evri has terrible track record in our area. I have had similar situation with their parent company Debenhams and Evri over Xmas-paid extra for delivery before Xmas but because I used Blue Light discount it reverted to standard delivery which should have been free for the amount of order anyway . So not only did I pay for the delivery which otherwise would have been free Evri delivered it later than standard delivery timeframe specified. The only response I got from them was I should read terms and conditions when I asked for the delivery charge to be refunded. Update: I’ve heard from customer service after nearly 12h saying they are sorry and sent me link to Evri tracking ( I have this already so not helpful) they’ve also told me to allow up to 48h-they haven’t explained how this works with next day delivery and also ignored my request for next day delivery refund.

Title: I had an issue with my bag
Text: I had an issue with my bag, which became damaged sooner than expected. I contacted Lucy & Yak customer service and received a very quick, friendly, and helpful response. The team reviewed my case and provided a credit note without any hassle. I really appreciated how easy and straightforward the process was, as well as the kindness shown throughout the communication. Thank you to Zac and the Lucy & Yak team for the excellent customer service. It's reassuring to know that the company stands behind its products and values its customers. Highly recommended!

Title: Best Customer Care
Text: I think this has been the best aftercare I have had from a company. I needed to return a jacket as it had a fault. Ali was fantastic at guiding me through the process no fuss quick and efficient. You may pay a little extra but they really look after the customers.

Title: Have been waiting for a refund for a…
Text: Have been waiting for a refund for a dress I returned back in May. Contacted boohoo customer service and have provided all proof of postage and return and every single response from them is asking me for proof of postage. It is a different person responding each time and no one reads my previous emails so they start the whole process again. I have asked to escalate this and to make a formal complaint and there has been no acknowledgment. This is a £150 dress which they are not refunding me for. If this matter cannot be resolved promptly, I will pursue recovery through my payment provider via chargeback or Section 75 (if applicable), and I will consider commencing proceedings through the small claims process as this outstanding amount is more than £100.

Title: Ordered an item which is effectively a…
Text: Ordered an item which is effectively a brand sold on Shein. Wasn’t impressed with the quality so returned this, at my own cost and almost a month later I still haven’t received my refund. DO NOT BUY FROM THIS SITE. I used to use Missguided a lot back in the day but it has gone totally downhill. I can almost guarantee you will find the same items on shein and at least you will be refunded if no good!

Title: Help with missing return
Text: Customer service department (Cristina) was very helpful when I returned a hoodie to them but no replacement or refund arrived back. Problem investigated and I now look forward to receiving the replacement.

Title: I bought shoes from them for a wedding
Text: I bought shoes from them for a wedding,  I am a size 9, have ordered size 9 shoes from them previously and they fit fine. I go buy some heels for an upcoming wedding,  they are literally 2 sizes too big even though they are apparently size 9. I email them to see what's going on with their sizes,  have they changed supplier? Is the sizing wrong etc.  I get nothing but a run around with different so called "customer service" people, there were about 6 different emails sent with replys with mostly generic responses,  some staff were helpful then when I would get a reply it would be from a different staff member who just says the generic reply back and Clearly hasn't read what the issue is, then I'm back at square one. Omg the most ridiculous so called customer service I have ever come across. I missed out on getting shoes I needed for the wedding as by the time of all these ridiculous emails back and forth with them it was too late.  Pretty disgusted with their so called customer service.  Absolute joke

Title: AVOID! AVOID! AVOID!!
Text: I have been a regular boohoo customer for years and always pay for premium delivery. I had two gift cards which I used on two separate orders and paid part card with both. I returned some items and I am STILL waiting for a refund since 10th April! I have been in touch with them several times and they won’t resend my gift cards to an alternative email address even though I’m not receiving it and they have said the gift card has expired so there’s nothing they can do!!! I’m absolutely appalled with the level of service I have received! They are still refusing to give me my refund even though under the Consumer Rights Act 2015 and Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013 I am entitled to a refund within a reasonable period. They are  breaching consumer rights and unfair commercial practice.

Title: Great clothes and great customer service
Text: Great clothes and great customer service

Title: Unable to return items bought via Azure Fashion
Text: Unable to return items bought via Boohoo from Azure Fashion.  The only way to contact Boohoo was via Messager and the automated response just kept repeating the same return option that didn't work.  Avoid buying anything you might want to return from Azure Fashion. Boohoo doesn't have any customer service!

Title: Still waiting on my order nearly 3…
Text: Still waiting on my order nearly 3 weeks later, customer service no help at all. Ive contacted them numerous times. Terrible company,  would not order from missguided again..

Title: Product were absolute rubbish
Text: Product were absolute rubbish, very low quality. Then stiffed me on returns short changing me on refund l. Short changing customers great strategy

Title: I ordered from Boohoo and paid for next…
Text: I ordered from Boohoo and paid for next day delivery, but my parcel was never even handed over to the courier. After contacting customer service, I was told to get back in touch if there was no update and a refund would be arranged. However, when I contacted them again, I was instead told that they needed to “investigate” the issue, leaving me still waiting with no parcel and no refund. I have now also been asked to wait a further two days for the ‘seller’ to respond, which is confusing as the issue appears to be entirely due to the seller’s actions. The lack of a timely resolution has made what should have been a straightforward process unnecessarily frustrating. It’s extremely annoying to pay extra for next day delivery and then not receive the order at all, especially when the issue appears to be on Boohoo’s side. The communication has been inconsistent, and the whole process has taken far longer than it should. Very disappointing experience.

Title: Disappointed & poor customer service
Text: Disappointed. Been a loyal Boohoo customer for years, pay for the annual premium delivery service and today have been let down by them. Placed an order last night which all seemed fine, got my order confirmation etc. all as expected. Only to find this morning I had the dispatch note with an extra added to my order! They'd added some new "worry free postage" fee on that I didn't select and wasn't on my original order confirmation but magically appeared on the dispatch email. So I contacted customer services who have basically said I added it myself and there are no refunds, no exceptions. Really disappointing when I have screenshots of both before it was added on my original order and the dispatch email where it was added. It was only £3 but if they do that to everyone then say it's not our problem then they're going to make a killing off it. I will not be shopping here again! Avoid!

Title: THE WORST EXPERIENCE
Text: THE WORST EXPERIENCE. It’s nearly impossible to work out how to return items

Title: Took ages to deliver then when got here…
Text: Took ages to deliver then when got here it is a piece of rag.  When I go onto the returns site it says none of my info ie email phone number or order number exists

Title: STEALING FROM CUSTOMERS
Text: If I could rate lower than 1 star I would. My experience with boohoo has been terrible! on the 10th of April 2026, I returned my boohoo order, a couple of days later Klarna reached out to me to advise boohoo have claimed to have not received this so I needed to provide proof of return. Several times this happened. I then spoke to Boohoo customer service via imessage, someone confirmed to me on the 23rd of April that they received my FULL return. On the 17th of May, I had an update on Klarna to advise I owed money- which is strange as I had returned all items and even had confirmation from boohoo they received this, I reached out to them again via imessage and was told there was nothing they could do as over a month had passed (SHOCKING!), I then emailed their customer service, which has been ongoing for a while now. On the 17th of May I received confirmation again that they have got my return and I was told to wait 8 working days for this to be investigated and for me to get my refund. 8 working days passed, I reached out to boohoo again and was told I received the refund in April (which is not correct as only part was returned to me), I told them to re-read my email trail and come back to me with an update, I was told I needed to wait a further 7 working days for it to be investigated...so what was the previous 8 working days for? I explained I cannot wait another 7 working days and needed an update and the full refund ASAP, I got a response saying it is being investigated and I need to wait 48 hours... Customer service has been awful, I cannot believe you are refusing to give me my refund back even though you have confirmed on several occasions you received the full return. DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY UNLESS YOU WANT THEM TO STEAL YOUR MONEY. I asked to speak to a manager to escalate my complaint and was asked 'why, there is nothing a manager can do that our admin team can't' well the admin team apparently can't even give me the refund I deserve. Not even a single apology, this has been going on for almost 2 months now. I will NOT be using Boohoo ever again and I will be taking this further. I have been a loyal/regular customer with boohoo over the years and I am appalled at how I am being treated.

Title: I’m unlucky I think with Boohoo
Text: I’m unlucky I think with Boohoo, everything I have bought has been substandard. Faulty items coming, I bought a really pretty dress, long enough (I can struggle here as have ling kegs) however I just could walk in it, it needed a split in it that’s all! Fit perfectly otherwise. I ordered shorts, they were cheap, just to thruw on fur hols, one leg was clearly longer than the other. I couldn’t dirt a return easily online, as ‘boohoo’ was not recognised with evri! But the Facebook DM was really quick to sort. others might be fine with boo-boo, not me.. Honestly, I’ve had better quality stuff from Temu and shein, get what you pay for I guess.. really gutted about the dress, was so pretty on, but need to be able to walk!

Title: Customer Service is excellent
Text: Customer Service is excellent, I had an issue with some clothing, their response has been First Class, the issue dealt with and I am still a happy customer who will continue to purchase from Rapanui, special thanks to Sarah and Rich for their assistance.

Title: Absolutely disgraceful customer…
Text: Absolutely disgraceful customer service! Been trying to get a resolution to my complaint since last Wednesday and every correspondence is system generated! Not looking into all previous information I have sent! Still not received my parcel and nobody taking ownership! Absolute shambles

Title: AVOID AT ALL COSTS
Text: AVOID AT ALL COSTS. The clothes that I ordered arrived but the sizing was wrong and had to return all of the items. The returns process is difficult and confusing. I have not received a refund or acknowledgment of my return, although Evri have emailed to say the return had been delivered. I have emailed customer services who asked me to add some further information. I did as I was asked and have sent follow up emails which have been ignored.

Title: Paid for next day delivery
Text: Paid for next day delivery, this hasnt happened. EVRI will not update where my parcel is, and boohoo do not answer whatsapp/facebook, just a continual generic message. I still have no order or refund for paying extra for a parcel ive never received!! Its very frustrating you cant speak to anyone. I specifically chose next day to take away with me.

Title: Wonderful company great clothes
Text: Loved my dungarees great quality but to big! Had to return for smaller size which fit perfectly. What I am really impressed with is their customer service it was exemplary as several emails were exchanged due to refund/discount etc nothing was too much trouble so thank you Lucy & yak shining example how to treat customers 🥰

Title: Outstanding customer service department…
Text: Outstanding customer service department at Finisterre.  Returned an item, got a replacement sent out with no quibble or hassle.  Some companies could learn a lot from this team.  Thanks again.

Title: BREAKING GDPR laws
Text: BREAKING GDPR laws. I've requested to have my account deleted at the start of 2026! It is JUNE and it has not been deleted despite me constantly requesting this nonstop. Would not recommend this brand at all!

Title: Never again
Text: Never again! Who would have thought returning a faulty item would be so bureaucratic. It has been a month and I've only just received my refund now and they had the audacity to retain £2 for the returns process. Boohoo claimed they could not find the order against the order number issued by them? I honestly thought I was being scammed by email rather than chatting to a major online retailer. After sending emails upon emails, receiving links that do not work, to finally returning the item, I was receiving inconsistent advice about how the refund would be processed and had to prove postage by sending not only proof of postage but delivery as well, bizarre and not what you would expect from a seemingly successful retailer. The entire experience is a turn off and I will never be buying anything from them again. It made me wonder what kind of cowboy operation was running behind the scenes. It's also concerning that they are not following GDPR and had my information saved from 10 years ago, which became apparent when they were referencing old details

Title: Extremely Poor Customer Service and NO help for vulnerable people
Text: **Extremely Poor Customer Service – Still Unable to Return £400+ Worth of Items** I am extremely disappointed with the level of customer service I've received from Boohoo regarding a return worth over £400. I followed the return process and selected multiple items to return. Boohoo originally sent my order in several separate parcels, yet I was only provided with one return code. When I attempted to arrange the return, I was later informed that I would need separate return codes for separate parcels. However, there appears to be no way to cancel or amend the original return request, leaving me completely stuck. Despite contacting customer service multiple times, nobody has been able to resolve what should be a straightforward issue. The AI chat was unhelpful, and several customer service agents either failed to understand the problem or simply repeated that a return had already been created, despite me explaining multiple times that the issue was the inability to obtain the correct return labels. One response completely ignored the actual concern, and follow-up messages went unanswered. My biggest concern is that while I continue trying to get help, I could end up outside the returns timeframe through no fault of my own. I have the items packed and ready to send back, but I cannot do so because Boohoo has not provided a workable solution. As a long-standing customer, I expected far better support, particularly when trying to return such a significant order value. The lack of communication, ownership and urgency shown throughout this process has been incredibly frustrating. I would strongly urge Boohoo to improve its returns process and ensure customer service agents are empowered to resolve issues rather than sending customers in circles. I am heavily pregnant and about to be due on maternity leave so would be considered vulnerable under Consumer Duty and the Financial Ombudsman, something that boohoo doesn’t seem to be experienced in as I’ve been fobbed off at every communication possible. Feel so so let down and will not be shopping with them again unfortunately.

Title: Absolutely useless service
Text: Absolutely useless service Placed an order - UK1128677257 Paid for next day delivery and it didnt arrive, spoke to BOOHOO who offered no assistance and clearly had no interest at all. I am now trying to arrange a return but their system states my order number does not exist. You honestly could not make it up. I will be raising a claim with my Bank in the morning.

Title: DO NOT BUY from his company!!!
Text: DO NOT BUY from his company!!!!  They have sent me the wrong size on the last 2 dresses I’ve purchased and they charge me shipping and processing fees when I return them.  It’s their mistake and they still punish me.  I was told I could just return the dress, provide proof of purchase, and they would send out my correct size that I ordered.  I did all of this and they did not honor their word.  They reimbursed me the cost of the dress minus the shipping and processing fees.  I was told I didn’t need to worry about these fees from one customer service agent and then I never got to talk to this person again.  It’s been email after email after email with all different agents, I think they use chat bots to automatically respond and I can’t talk to a real person.  They take forever to get back to you.  I’ve been dealing with this for over a month now because they are not timely with responding.  If I could give them a negative 100 stars I would.  They will rip you off, do not shop on this website and give them your hard earned money.  HORRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE, and THEY ARE THIEVES THAT STEAL FROM YOU!!

Title: Won't be buying from here again
Text: Won't be buying from here again! Some of the clothes I ordered are from Shein. Can't seem to make a return either so im stuck with the items. Don't bother!

Title: Joke
Text: I wished I’d looked here before purchasing two t shirts.  What a joke of an experience can’t use the gift card given as a cheaper refund.  Where’s the policing of this site. Avoid avoid avoid

Title: Worst experience ever.
Text: It would be Zero stars if this was an option... Very disappointed with my experience after using Boohoo for many years. After returning several items from my order, my refund was not handled correctly, and I ended up paying more than I should have for the items I kept. I also incurred a late payment fee as a result of the issues with my account due to their delays. What has been most frustrating is the way the matter has been handled. Resolving a straightforward refund issue has taken far more time and effort than it should have, and I have been left repeatedly chasing for answers rather than receiving clear, accurate support! As a long-standing customer, I expected much better. Unfortunately, this experience has completely eroded my confidence in the company, and as a result, you have lost a valued customer. There is a clear need for improvement in customer service, particularly when dealing with complaints and refund disputes. Customers deserve timely, knowledgeable, and personalised support from people who can properly investigate and resolve issues, rather than generic responses that fail to address the concerns being raised. I cannot recommend a company that handles customer issues in this way and hope serious improvements are made to prevent others from having a similar experience. However, reading other reviews this is clearly a standard way of working. Be better Boohoo.

Title: Bought two items and paid for next day…
Text: Bought two items and paid for next day delivery, it said would be delivered between 11am and 13pm which was why I paid the extra. Still not arrived in fact the courier states two days delivery. Boohoo claim will be here by 9pm? Hardly next day and courier says might be tomorrow. Now going round the houses to get my delivery charge refunded.  Ooh now passed to another department. Guess what they are busy. They even admitted the information I was given was wrong!!!!

Title: Easy ordering experience

I keep getting a message on customer service saying they are busy, I have received the same message all week

Title: Great company.

Title: Will not buy anything from primark…
Text: Will not buy anything from primark again. Everything became rubbish quality. Bought recently a duvet, it has such a bad petrol smell it doesn't disappear after airing outside. New pyjamas gone to charity terrible seams and stitching. Won't even bother to go inside any primark again.

Title: Do not pay next days delivery
Text: I bought a chest of drawers from Debenhams website sold by boohoo and it didn’t come next day even though I paid extra ! Opened a dispute with clear pay for a refund as the customer service is shocking

Title: Scammed by boohoo -

Contacted them again today only to be told that’s now it’s been over a month they are keeping the money and returned item. How is this even legal? Awful. This is the first time I’ve ever returned an item to them.

Title: If i could rate less than one star I…

Contacted them said they will let me know when they ship it out 2 weeks now and 3 emails later no response. Will be contacting my bank to issue a refund. Clothes look nice on the website so you feel inticed to buy but not worth the stress ... I needed the item for an event had to order something else. God knows where they are getting there clothes from it can't take that long to ship out an item!!!

Title: Why is it that I paid for next day…
Text: Why is it that I paid for next day delivery and 3 days later im still waiting.  Not happy and it will be returned if I receive it. Evri who you use is definitely not up to the task, I suggest you use another company. At this point im not even interested in my order cause I needed days ago. So do better and I could do with a postage refund. Didn't get what I paid for.

Title: Excellent T Shirts
Text: 7 x Oversize Ts. Lovely to wear out of the pack. Kept one for reference and 3 washes in there's almost no shrink to others. Excellent quality, comfortable. Appear v durable. Small label does curl but is v easy to cut off. Going back for 7 more. Website simple, delivery as expected and packaging sensible.

Title: Won’t shop here again!
Text: The tracking and order was unorganised and unprofessional. When I finally received my purchase it didn’t fit even though the sizing for that product matched my measurements. So I returned it for another size which wasn’t easy I had to order the new product separately as they don’t do exchanges I got a refund which was a lot less than what I paid. I am mostly happy with the product I have now except that it has a lot of creases and because of the material I am unable to iron it. Definitely won’t be using this website again!

Title: Stay away from them they steal your…
Text: Stay away from them they steal your money product never arrived because they use multiple logistic so you can’t keep track tell you stories what a Scam this is Australia what a joke

Title: Good quality clothing
Text: Good quality clothing, reasonable pricing and excellent customer service.

Title: High quality clothes
Text: High quality clothes. High quality ethics. Beautiful customer service. Genuine humans on the end of the line. Sizing can be generous. Packaging is ethical. Clothes last and last. A long term customer who goes back every time.

Title: SCAMMERS! Strongly advise you to AVOID!!!
Text: AVOID!! Please be aware that 99% of positive reviews for Missguided are PRE their Shein takeover in Oct 2023. It has now changed hands and is not the same. Now, if you need to return anything, it will be a nightmare. I am still waiting for a refund despite returning the items at my own expense via a tracked, signed-for service. They tried to tell me they issued my refund on 9th May 2026. PayPal said no, they did not!! This whole experience has left me feeling completely scammed! Absolute LIARS, this is so dishonest of them. How they get away with this, I do not know.

Title: Amazing company
Text: Amazing company, so glad I have found. Purchased some new t-shirts firstly and they are so soft and fit so well. Lovely colours too. I then ordered a jacket (which I had to get sent back to them to post back to a different address as I posted to a friends), they very kindly posted it back to me first class! Can’t wait for my jacket and will keep buying from here

Title: Exemplary customer care
Text: Excellent response from Teemills team when I queried the predicted delivery date. Top customer care as ever

Title: I won’t use this website again
Text: I won’t use this website again. The customer service is pretty much non existent. No one gets back to email enquiries. I purchased 3 items in October 2025, it is now May 2026 and 1 of the items I returned (kept other 2) was never refunded and no one is interested in responding to help with the refund. I would avoid unless you are certain you will keep all items you are ordering.

Title: Really pleased - great quality.
Text: I ordered a pair of women's joggers shorts. Lovely fit and great quality and I'm going to get so much wear out of them. I also ordered a multipack of kids tshirts. I had to exchange for a different size, which was really easy. My son loves the fit and design. So nice to find boys tshirts that are colourful and not gaming related, unlike on the high street!

Title: I discovered Lucy & Yak purely by…
Text: I discovered Lucy & Yak purely by chance.  I bought a pair of dungarees and wondered if I'd suit them etc being 64+. I absolutely love them. Worn them once and have had huge compliments.  They are so stylish, comfortable,  trendy, I could go on. Love them.   The ease of ordering and receiving was fine for me. No issues at.  Will definitely purchase another pair. I also like the story behind the company too.

Title: excellent customer service
Text: excellent customer service. when my order was lost in transit they quickly sent replacements.

Title: Admirable company ethos but need to improve the customer service
Text: This company deserves praise for selling organic clothing at a reasonable price point. However the quality has gone down a bit. I bought some plain cotton t shirts here last year by Stella/Stanley which were superb. I’ve gone to buy them again and they look the same on the website but the t shirts are made by someone else and were a different shape and weight of cotton. Not what I wanted so I returned them. I am taking a star off as 2 weeks later I am still waiting for a refund to show up in my bank account. They are also slow to reply to emails. I emailed them to enquire if they will be restocking the original plain t shirts I liked so much but have not had a reply weeks later. I have been chasing up the refund and they have responded to those emails. The original purchase and delivery was smooth but the returns and refund process has been disappointing.

Title: Very impressed
Text: I ordered 4 items and didn't check reviews. As the items had taken a little while, I looked at reviews and my heart sank! Such bad reviews. I am delighted! All the items were in a very good state, no smell and not wet. Folded really nicely. All 4 items are made well and of decent quality. Moreover, they all fit perfectly. I am pretty amazed after reading so many bad reviews on here. My experience has been excellent. Took a bit of time to arrive but nothing too bad. From what I bought, I highly recommend. Maybe I got lucky, I dont know but I can only rate by this order.

What chance do her team stand when she is a very poor mentor. She needs to revisit customer service training.

Went to buy another item, also out of stock. Customer Service advised it came in other sizes...unbelievable.

Title: a return to clothing as a form of respect
Text: 'There are garments one wears… and then there are garments one enters into relationship with. My experience with Rapanui has been of the latter. I came to them quietly, seeking not simply comfort, but congruence — a harmony between what touches my skin and what I hold to be true. Their pieces, particularly the underwear and trackies I now find myself living in, carry a rare integrity. The fabric does not feel manufactured in haste; it feels considered, almost reverent. There is a softness that is not merely tactile, but energetic — as though the material itself has been allowed to remain close to its origin. Rapanui’s commitment to organic fibres, circular design, and renewable production is not just branding rhetoric; it is perceptible. One senses it in the breathability of the cotton, in the absence of harshness, in the way the garments settle on the body without resistance. It is clothing that does not impose — it accompanies. In a world saturated with synthetic urgency, there is something profoundly grounding about wearing pieces that feel clean in both composition and intention. For those of us who are attentive to the subtle dialogue between body, environment, and energy, this matters deeply. What we wear becomes an extension of our field. I have worn their underwear and trackies not as occasional comforts, but as daily companions — and they have held their shape, their softness, and their quiet presence with grace. Others speak similarly of their quality and natural materials, often highlighting their durability and comfort, alongside a genuine commitment to sustainability. This is not fast fashion. It is something slower, more conscious — a return, perhaps, to clothing as a form of respect: for the body, for the earth, and for the unseen threads that connect the two. For me, purity in clothing is not an aesthetic preference; it is a practice. And in that regard, Rapanui feels aligned.'

Title: Honestly fantastic!
Text: Honestly, I wasn’t expecting the quality of the t shirts to be so good! I tried one, then ordered 4 more! I’m hoping they don’t discontinue the oversized t shirts now I’ve found them! Just fab shape and fabric! Excellent service and prompt delivery.

Title: Exceptional customer service from Ali
Text: Exceptional customer service from Ali. I contacted Finisterre with a query about a potential issue with my jacket. This was dealt with so well - I wish other companies could be this good. I buy few clothes, but most from Finisterre, due to quality and sustainability. My contact with customer service was outstanding - gives me the confidence to keep coming back.

Title: As always L&Y were super
Text: As always L&Y were super helpful in resolving my issue.  Points don’t seem to have linked onto my account properly but it’s all been sorted manually! Always love how helpful and quick staff are any time I have a query. Overall I think L&Y have the best customer service from any company I’ve interacted with. Always so kind and polite.

Title: Quality of goods and great Customer Service
Text: It has been my 4th positive experience with RAPANUI. Always on a lookout for organic cotton quality stuff, I am never disappointed with RAPANUI. Already purchased beautiful hats and scarves, and recently oversized zip hoodies in three colours. Strongly recommend, just a heads up, you need a size smaller, as they come really large. I had to exchange for smaller ones. That was not an issue, as the Customer Service was 5 STAR. Max kept me informed all the way. Snugged in my warm and lovely hoodie already. I will definitely come again :)

Title: What a brilliant level of service
Text: What a brilliant level of service, chose the wrong size on something but didn’t realise until it was past the 30 day return period. I sent an email and was granted a credit note. I already loved Lucy and Yak but now I love them even more

Title: Cashier Lazy
Text: Portsmouth, Commercial Road branch. Waited a long time in queue as they walled off access to the self-checkouts and rather than squeeze by everyone behind us we stuck it out. Got to til, served. Was fine. Nothing special. My mum was stood right next to me holding her items to be served right after me. Cashier mad eye contact with us both and clearly noted that my mum was also to be served. Got to the end, pointed out customer survey on receipt and then declared she wasn't serving anymore and left the checkout, leaving my mum holding her items and myself stood there like absolute idiots. We then had to wait further for the checkout next to us to finish refunding their items before we could then be served. At no point whatsoever in my transaction was it indicated, even remotely, that this was the last customer she would be serving. To add insult to total injury the response to the customer survey was unsatisfactory - a copy paste response of oops, we will pass this along. No wonder the ratings on here are so low the store is a disgrace. Cheap clothes, cheap service. I was so incensed after the appalling display that I've come here to write about it!

Title: I had an issue with my delivery
Text: I had an issue with my delivery due to DHL, who unfortunately didn’t cooperate at all and ended up returning my package to the UK without even attempting proper delivery. However, the customer service from Lucy & Yak was absolutely amazing. They were incredibly kind, understanding, and genuinely felt sorry about the situation. They helped me as much as they could, kept communicating clearly, and even offered me a discount because of everything that happened. I also received sincere apologies, which I really appreciated. I’ve always been a big fan of Lucy & Yak, and this experience only confirmed that. Their clothing is not only super fun and unique, but also really great quality especially the trousers, and I love their shirts and sweaters as well. Thank you for the great service Ella (and the rest of the team) 💛

Title: Anyone know how to complain higher…
Text: Anyone know how to complain higher still no sign of my refund after chasing customer serves and sending proof or return?

Staff were lovely too, very chatty and happy to help (I would be too if I worked there, it’s a dream of a shop!) Treated myself to dungarees, trousers and a t-shirt. Don’t usually treat myself like that but could not resist as there’s so many nice things. Quality of the clothing is great too. Overall a very positive experience 🙂

Text: Finisterre has always been an incredible clothing company with a great mission but on top of that they have amazing customer service! I had received the wrong order and instead of asking me to send it back, Finisterre sent me the correct pair free of charge and told me to keep the wrong order as well. It's this kind of customer service that goes a long way! Extra kudos especially for a brand that is so environmentally conscious too!

Title: They never delivered my parcel and they…
Text: They never delivered my parcel and they said they did. Felons ! Should not be allowed to sell . Customer service should take action .

Title: Ignoring customers
Text: I contacted Missguided to arrange a return and initially received a response with a return address, but was told I had to cover the postage myself. Most companies now provide prepaid return labels, so had I known this, I wouldn’t have placed the order—especially when returning multiple items. I’ve now returned the items and provided full proof of postage, but despite emailing three times, I’ve had no response. It feels like my emails are being ignored to delay or avoid issuing a refund. Very disappointing experience, and I won’t be ordering from them again. I will let paypal know in order to get my refund back and I will post this all over my Instagram following and tiktok.

Title: Amazing customer service
Text: Amazing customer service! Really quick, friendly and helpful responses from real life people which is lovely these days!

Title: Awful non-responsive customer service…
Text: Awful non-responsive customer service that just ignore your emails despite saying they will respond within 24 hours, that's a joke! The returns policy does not state anywhere that the customer pays for return postage but they do. Just wondering if anyone actually ever receives their refund? Honest advice would be to AVOID this SH*T SHOW

Title: Fantastic experience at Lucy & Yak in Exeter
Text: Fantastic experience at Lucy & Yak Exeter! My daughter and I visited Lucy & Yak in Exeter today just for a browse, and ended up leaving with a lovely t-shirt and a beautiful floral dress. We were helped by Connie and Kira, who were both fantastic. They gave us great advice, shared helpful tips, explained what was available in different sizes and styles, and guided us to the changing rooms. Their customer service was genuinely excellent—friendly, attentive, and knowledgeable. We also loved the community notice board in store, where I was able to put up some Wellbeing Exeter cards for my work. It’s such a thoughtful touch and really adds to the welcoming atmosphere. It was great to see a range of affordable extras too, like plant pots, £1 bags, and the £3 canvas bags. Overall, we had a really lovely shopping experience. Customer service was 10/10—you truly feel welcomed and supported here. We’ll definitely be back!

Title: Wtf happened to Missguided
Text: Wtf happened to Missguided? Obviously didn’t realise it had been taken over by a cheap awful company and now the quality is DIRE with inflated prices and you’ll wait 100 days to even get your items.

Title: Unfair returns policy for defected items
Text: It took over a week for the item to be delivered and when it finally arrived it was damaged. Had to pay for it to be delivered and pay again for it's return. Appalling! They provide defected clothing but expect you to cover the cost. If I could give zero stars I would. I don't recommend this company, as there are far better ones out there that have better quality clothing and a fairer returns policy.Particularly, if items arrive damaged.

Title: Love Lucy &Yak
Text: I have ordered lots of items from Lucy & Yak and I love their clothes and bags. I have nothing but great stuff to say about their items and their customer service has always been amazing. I have always ordered online and never managed to go to one of your stores. Sadly I have recently moved to Australia but when I return to the UK for a holiday I will 100 % go into one of your stores in person. Happy customer indeed.

Title: WILL NOT REFUND MY TRACKED RETURN - AVOID!!!!
Text: Ordered an item - returned it tracked delivery and they’ve decided not to refund me. So taking it to my bank now. It’s been weeks!!!! Thieves and clearly scammers - wish I had checked trustpilot!!!!!!! What happened to the good old Missguided??!! I don’t even want to leave one star. This is fraud and theft of my money!!!!!! I will be reporting and making sure anyone I know avoids like the bubonic plague

Title: Helpful and thorough ✨
Text: Helpful and thorough ✨

Title: Excellent customer service
Text: Again, swift communication and my query answered and dealt with effectively. 🙏🏼

Title: Great customer service and product quality!
Text: I have placed several orders with Lucy and Yak before, and I have always been pleased with the product I received and the customer service. Most recently I placed an order in which I received two of the items I ordered and one item that was the same type as what I ordered but the wrong color. After emailing customer service, they promptly responded and created a new order to send me the correct item and didn't ask me to go out of my way to return the incorrect item. I am very pleased with how well this brand treats its customers. It is a bit expensive, but I always know what I get from them will be high quality. I also really appreciate their brand ethics.

Title: I love the team
Text: I love the team, they always come across as friendly and helpful. They respond well to feedback. You definitely feel like you matter as a customer to Lucy & Yak. ❤️

Title: The jeans length was shorter than…
Text: The jeans length was shorter than expected. The material is decent, just not as sturdy as I hoped.

Title: the Men's Future Waves Coho Sweatshirt
Text: I recently went into the Finisterre store in Cambridge and bought the Men's Future Waves Coho Sweatshirt in Deep Sea, along with a T shirt. As always, the staff were super helpful and friendly. I think Finisterre is my current favourite brand and love their jackets, Ts and Sweatshirts, as they always feel and look great.

Title: If I could leave zero stars I would
Text: If I could leave zero stars I would ! Absolutely no return policy for customers what’s so ever ! They tell you to pay for the return with certain carriers and if you don’t you won’t get refunded and then you have to send them a photo of the label and tracking number etc and then they say if it’s not satisfactory then they won’t refund basically! I have never known a complaint not provide a QR Code for returns ! Absolutely disgusting ! I will never shop with missguided again ! And begrudge giving them 1star .

Title: Great help in the changing area
Text: Danny the shop assistant couldn't do any more to become ,being a curvy girl I don't feel comfortable in changing areas ,but she helped to find other sizes and said she liked what I had chosen and said I looked great in them .

Title: Just not worth it
Text: Just not worth it. I learned my lesson never shop with a company who does not provide a prepaid shipping label. Because I was returning denim, shipping was over $13.

Title: Trafford centre store staff useless
Text: Went to the Trafford centre store this evening and the staff were appalling My wife asked 2 different members of staff if they stocked a particular item of clothing both said no and acted like they couldn’t care less We found the item after spending 20 minutes looking Then had to queue for ages cos only half the tills were open

Title: I discovered some flaws in the fabric…
Text: I discovered some flaws in the fabric of the first jumpsuit I got sent and they made it right quickly. Some of the best customer service I’ve experienced! Will definitely buy again and have already turned one of my sisters on to them for their inclusive sizing!

Title: I was able to return my trousers easily…
Text: I was able to return my trousers easily with no fuss when the sizing was incorrect. I did have to send another email to receive my refund though as there was a slight delay.

Title: Love love love ❤️
Text: Love love love ❤️ Ella is a ⭐

Title: Not ordered anything
Text: Not ordered anything. Wrost products

Title: A disgrace
Text: Ordered several items, took forever to receive.  Trying to return anything back is a complete nightmare, so frustrating, it's pretty much impossible and after reading all these reviews with having to pay for returns and not receiving a refund have decided to keep the items and sell on otherwise will certainly be out of pocket at least hopefully will get something back.  Customer service is shocking just a generic email with false information. Never will I purchase from them again. My advice...AVOID!!!

Title: Buyer beware!
Text: I ordered a white lace dress with bell sleeves from Missguided. When the dress arrived and I tried it on, the sleeves were huge and overhung past my fingertips. I started the returns process which was a nightmare. I was constantly having to email them then wait weeks for a reply. Eventually, I had to take photographs with a tape measure on the garment to show the problem,  which I did, then wait weeks again for a reply. Eventually, they said to return the garment but they wouldn't reimburse me for the cost of the return postage. I had to chase them up for weeks again regarding my refund, I then received an email asking for proof of postage. Luckily,  I'd screenshot the tracking emails from Royal Mail which showed the items journey and even a photo of it at their depot. Still no response from them so I had to email again asking for my refund. A few days later, I received a reply saying I'd get a $19.99 refund, yet I'd paid $5.22 postage for the item to be sent and nearly £4 for it to be sent back to them. It's outrageous when the item they sent is manufactured incorrectly, with the sleeves being 4 inches longer than a normal sized ladies sleeve. How are women expected to wear this dress when the sleeves overhang past their fingertips by 4 inches? So buyer beware, the item you receive may be totally the wrong size, looks nothing like the photograph or is flawed but you'll have to pay the postage both ways if you want to return it. A Chinese company masquerading as a British company with no qualms about sending you inferior, missized ladies clothing.

Title: I’d give them less than one star if I…
Text: I’d give them less than one star if I could. I ordered a jacket which was huge so had to return. Went on their portal to see how to return. Returns are payable by the customer. So I paid evri for the return then went to print label at the shop. You have to put the bar code and a photo of the parcel on their portal. I got the address on their return portal. Just received an email telling me it’s a different address and it does not match the tracking number. Absolute scam. They have changed the postal address so it will not now get to the correct person or address. I’m absolutely livid. I’ve emailed customer services twice now. Don’t buy anything from them. I  know they have been bought out by Shein but even Shein are better than this rubbish. They need to get better with their customer services. Terrible !

Title: Definitely 10 out of 10!
Text: The customer service is the best and the communications is the fastest I have experienced! I placed an order on their website on Saturday and received the parcel on Tuesday. Super fast. It’s 2 jumpsuits. But after I tried it and thought it’s a bit tight for me so I wanted an exchange. I wasn’t quite sure about how to process exchange instead of return online, so I sent an e-mail. I sent the e-mail on Tuesday afternoon after 5pm. Super quick I got the reply e-mail just next morning 8:30am already. Liz, who replied my e-mail, had double confirmed what I want to exchange and sizes, gave me options of how to process the return, and confirming my address etc, managed to send out my parcel on that same afternoon already! Their designs are great, website is easy to use, and the customer service is the best I have experienced. Liz, you are the best!

Title: Excellent customer service from the whole team
Text: Excellent customer service from the Finisterre team, helping me with my Stormbird waterproof jacket. This is my second Stormbird and I’m delighted with V2. Well done and thank you!

Title: The worst experience in Hamburg
Text: The worst experience in Hamburg. The staff at this store don't speak English and treat people like thieves. Not even the manager or supervisor can string two words of English together. Terrible service.

Title: Great returns system
Text: Great returns system. Speedy replies when I had a question and the jeans are great!!! Great size inclusivity too

Title: I needed to find a replacement item…
Text: I needed to find a replacement item that was no longer available to purchase on the website - customer service picked up my query SO fast (over the weekend too, which was unexpected). They were able to raise an order for me once stock was located. Amazing customer service

Title: I never received and order (due to…
