Text: I never received and order (due to Royal Mail) once I informed Lucy and yak they were on it straight away and issued a refund.  Excellent service

Title: Don’t order from if based in the UK.
Text: Don’t order from if based in the UK. I made an £80 order and it took about 3 weeks to arrive. Good quality clothing but sizing way off so needed to send all 3 items back. Problem is they don’t have a returns procedure for the UK. You have to contact them to ask and they tell you to return via Royal Mail at your own expense!! Cost me £9 to send via tracked. You cannot upload the returns information on their returns page as it will not accept it. It only lists Evri (which they don’t use) and UPS and DHL. You also have to return to a random person in Walsall with no proper returns note inside just a hand written note. I then had to chase them for a refund after a week of receiving the parcel. Had to send the proof of return postage receipt to customer services before they acknowledged my return and refund. Very stressful and would never buy from again!!!

Title: Really great customer service from Finisterre
Text: Really great customer service from Finisterre. My original order was unfortunately lost in transit, but the team were incredibly helpful and quickly sent out a replacement free of charge. They were also very responsive and supportive when I later needed help with a return and refund query. Everything was handled smoothly and professionally throughout. A really positive experience — thank you so much for your help!

Title: Great clothes and great service
Text: As always, rapid delivery, great clothes and easy returns if they're not quite right. I'm really chuffed with my new cord jacket (felt very stylish for my holiday) and sloppy hoodie, so cosy. Got new pants too! These are a different design to before and the jury's still out on whether I like them as much. I love that I can send old clothes to Rapanui for recycling, I will be doing that, when they eventually wear out!

Title: Edinburgh Shop & Daisy
Text: I went into the Edinburgh George Street shop quite a few times looking for bags and a jacket. Daisy was extremely helpful, kind and always met me with a smile even after the third visit. Store is clean and tidy and staff are amazing. Would recommend a visit!

Title: Utterly delightful
Text: I had a problem with my old, but loved, Rainbird jacket, where the lining was flaking away at the neck. When I emailed Finisterre with my problem, hoping they might send me some tape to mend it, they not only emailed me right back but said they would replace the jacket completely. I sent it back at their expense the next day, and two days after that received my new Skybird jacket - it is even better than my old one, and I am beyond delighted with it. As much as the new jacket is superb, it is really the helpful and responsive attitude of the company which really impresses me - this is not paying lip service to longevity and sustainability, it is really and actually doing it. Brilliant!

Title: AVIOD - Returns go back to a name and not a business
Text: AVIOD - New company that's brough the name. The returns go back to a Name not a business. A silly returns process, you have to update a photo of the label on the parcel, you have to upload tracking number. If not done they do not refund you. Then when you provide this information at a later date, they do not refund all the items. SCAM

Title: Superb thank you
Text: Superb thank you. I had a fault on  My jumpsuit. I contacted them and had a reply and replacement straight away. Thank you

Title: “GLAD TO HAVE FOUND YOU”
Text: “GLAD TO HAVE FOUND YOU” I unexpectedly came across Finisterre on Pinterest. I loved the look of some of the clothes and after reading the great reviews I decided to make a purchase of two pairs of trousers. My order arrived two days later and although I loved the look and the quality, unfortunately the trousers were too big. I posted the trousers back with a note and very quickly I received a personal email reply to my note and soon after a refund. So I decided to replace the two trousers and add to the order with three more pairs. I now have five pairs of trousers and I love them all. The quality is great and the looks are exactly what I was looking for. I have decided to write a review because I wanted to say how pleased I am with my purchases but most of all for the great customer service which I cannot fault. A BIG thank you!

Title: Great fit
Text: Great fit, good quality, interesting designs and good ethics. Happy days

Title: It’s great to see the transparency of…
Text: It’s great to see the transparency of the company when it comes to sustainability as that is something important to me. There is a bit of a limited selection of styles, not many tapered pants. Sizing was personally the most difficult. If I went by body measurements, it did not fit although it could be an error on my end when measuring. I made two attempts to get the right size before deeming it a lost cause. They did reach out to ask about my measurements to give sizing recommendations for the pants and other clothing I want to purchase which I see as a great remedy. However, I feel as though I’ve lost enough money as a portion of my refund is used to pay for the shipping back. If I was in the UK, it might not be so bad but it’s decently expensive as a US resident. Customer service was very helpful when I accidentally swapped the return labels.

Title: Customer support par excellence
Text: My wife and I have been buying Finisterre products for years and think we both look cool in our wetsuits as we brave the Atlantic rollers with our body boards. Recently I contacted Finisterre about a small issue with a well-worn rain jacket that I'd had for years. Their response was swift, friendly and incredibly generous. It typified their attitude as a company and the pride they take in the quality of their products. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them.

Title: The quality of clothing is fantastic…
Text: The quality of clothing is fantastic and just seems to fit me well.

Title: Great company
Text: Great company, great ethos, great clothes Highly recommend people check them out. Clothes are always high quality.

Title: DO NOT BUY CHARGERS FROM HERE
Text: I’m happy with most of Primark’s products except their phone chargers which last less than a month. Sometimes cheap possibly doesn’t mean that the product is reliable or good quality. The charger disconnects if I even move my phone or plug it in.

Title: Well worth the money. Comfortable fit
Text: I ordered my fourth scoop neck t shirt as really like the design and fit of these. Not too low, a really nice length and the material feels very nice next to the skin. The others I have have washed well. Just hoping for a rose pink in this style 😊

Title: People genuinely compliment me!
Text: People genuinely compliment me on rapanui clothes. Unique, comfy and cool without being pretentious.

Title: I absolutely love Rapanui
Text: I absolutely love Rapanui and their ethos. The t-shirts are always loved when gifted. I have bought my favourite pj bottoms and shorts from them. Everything is well made using quality materials.

Title: Some of the best customer service
Text: Some of the best customer service I’ve experienced for years. 4 different stores helped me get an out of stock jumper, everyone went above and beyond to help. Thoroughly impressed by the Finisterre team.

Title: I love Rapanui
Text: I love Rapanui! Lovely clothes. Great quality. Good eco credentials.

Title: Love Rapanui
Text: Love Rapanui. Fantastic quality at reasonable prices. I have been buying their t shirts for about 4 years now. They reliably wash and wear really well.

Title: Quality gear
Text: Quality gear, pretty cool designs. Love the ethos Packaging easy to reuse. Clothes wash easy and last. Delivery so far has been when they say it will be. Issue’s wife keeps nicking my best hoody, daughter is eyeing up my tee’s

Title: Great underwear
Text: Great underwear. Brilliant service

Title: Great quality clothes at great prices
Text: Great quality clothes at great prices! I have been lucky enough to buy a few sweatshirts in the sale. Really pleased with the quality. Would definitely purchase more clothes in the future. Also, Rapanui are environmentally pro active too🙂 Its a thumbs up review from me👍🏼

Title: Rapanui provides great service
Text: Rapanui provides great service, great quality and design within an ethical and sustainable practice. I have been shopping their range for over 10 years now and always been very happy to return to them as a customer.

Title: I’ve been buying from Rapanui for about…
Text: I’ve been buying from Rapanui for about the last 10ish years. Love their clothing and the Remill scheme. 100% recommend - affordable ethical clothing. It’s made well and lasts.

Title: Circular superstar
Text: Rapanui make great quality, all natural products. I love the natural colours and the environmentally friendly dyes used. Also, Rapanui are leading the way in the circular economy and actually putting it into action in a B2C context! It's amazing to be able to send back items when they no longer fit me, rather than having to send them to landfill. Fingers crossed more businesses follow suit in future!

Title: Fab customer service
Text: Brilliant customer service, issue really very quickly resolved Would certainly buy from Finisterre again.

Title: Buy most of my clothes from here these…
Text: Buy most of my clothes from here these days. Great style and great quality and nice to know I'm not damaging the environment in the process.

Title: Rapanui the right choice
Text: I like Rapanui clothing and have bought several items down the years both for myself and family. The model they have set up is brave and the right thing to do in an age of disposal clothes not made to last. I haven't yet used the return scheme but plan to in the future.

Title: 2nd Purchase
Text: I already had 5 for £35 t-shirts from about 4 yrs ago. Still in great condition ( as new really! apart fron one which I wore painting...) Decided to buy the 7 for £60 offer just to have more variety in colour. Slightly different feel to the cotton and different crew neck but still the same good value.

Title: I fell in love with everything Rapanui…
Text: I fell in love with everything Rapanui stood for about 8 years ago and have bought bits and pieces over the years (they don’t wear out 🤣 some t-shirts still going strong) but now that I can send them back for recycling I can justify the odd extra purchase. This year it was the Parka coat that caught my eye and it’s a game changer for wet drizzly days. Almost makes being in the rain fun!!!

Title: Great quality products and excellent customer service
Text: Great quality products and excellent customer service when having to deal with returns or exchanges.

Title: All clothes.
Text: I have bought from Rapanui for a number of years and so far I have loved each item of clothing I have purchased whether it be cotton lined coat, trousers, tees or sweater, I can’t fault the quality. True to size. Customer service is faultless and that is why I keep on buying from this great ethical Company. Highly recommend.

Title: Favourite company
Text: I've had loads of clothes from Rapanui and they're all lovely. Anything that didn't fit was super easy to return. I love the sustainability ethics behind the company and the pricing is comparable to any high street retailer, so guilt free shopping!

Title: Rapanui our local business
Text: Rapanui clothes are very well made. I have bought lots of their organic cotton T-shirts and they always fit perfect. I also invested in a wild swim robe the colour is gorgeous and the towelling material on the inside does a very good job as I use it now to have a dip in the sea. I am also glad there are no big lettering on the back. The best of this company is that I can send back my clothes to be recycled. I would recommend Rapanui to anyone well done and it is also a local firm on the Isle of Wight. Thank you Rapanui keep on going you are doing a good job.

Title: Best clothing company ever
Text: Best clothing company ever: ethical and sustainable, recycles, prints custom t-shirts (great if you have a small business), great offers, great range of garments. What is not to like?

Title: Very well made clothes for everyday
Text: Very well made clothes for everyday! Sadly, I've only managed to send 1x T shirt back as I damaged it- they usually last AGES! Certainly a company I am very happy to support & will continue to do so, well done Rapanui!

Title: Great item arrived quickly
Text: Great item arrived quickly. Fabulous colour, quality and fit.

Title: Love my Rapanui Jumper 😊
Text: Love my Rapanui Jumper 😊 It is exactly how it was described, oversized and just what I was expecting. The colour is so vibrant too. I love the ethos of Rapanui too, a local company trying to make the clothing industry a better place.

Title: Great Quality, Great Company
Text: Swift order to despatch and delivery. Good selection of clothing, with great sizing charts and advice to help you make the right decision. I purchased both oversize and organic t-shirts and the quality is superior and worth every penny. Great fit and feel and they look amazing. Added benefit, when worn out scan the QR and return for recycle... So helpful the environment with purchase and aftersale! Highly recommended!

Title: Great company
Text: Efficient company that ticks all my ethical and eco boxes and great clothing

Title: Excellent quality
Text: Excellent quality. Speedy delivery.

Title: The clothes are wonderful
Text: The clothes are wonderful - and very cross-generational and loved by my children in their 30's as much as myself and my wife in our 60's! All contact with the company is a pleasure - very friendly and helpful. For us personally it is another plus point (as former Isle of Wight residents) that such a good company comes from a place we loved to live :)

Title: Great company
Text: I love Rapanui’s clothing and ethos - I’ve bought t-shirts, sweatshirts, shackets and hats, and get a lot of wear from all of them. They are the cornerstones of my day-to-day outfits. Great fabrics, thoughtful cuts and solid ethics.

Title: Great products and ethics
Text: I have bought many t-shirts, shirts and jackets from Rapanui and all fit great and are good quality. Caring for the environment is important to me so it's good to know it matters to Rapanui too.

Title: Rapanui is my go to for good quality, ethical clothing
Text: Rapanui is my go to for good quality, ethical clothing. I could create so many different outfits with their items both for work and at weekends, and for every kind of weather!! I love that it's organic cotton, sustainably made and super comfortable.

Title: I love Rapanui!
Text: I absolutely love Rapanui as a company, their clothes are always really well made.  I love the vibe of the brand as sustainable and nature loving, there is so much fast fashion around now and Rapanui feels like an antidote to that.  I own several pieces from them and they are my go to for basics that I know will be comfortable and last.

Title: Rapanui is a brand I can trust
Text: Rapanui is a brand I can trust to provide high quality garments made by environmentally sound methods and sustainable organic materials. The website is easy to navigate, the ordering process straightforward and delivery is reliable and quick.

Title: Their clothes are well designed
Text: Their clothes are well designed, well made with great material + they care for the environment! They make me feel and look good.

Title: Fantastic brand doing what all other…
Text: Fantastic brand doing what all other fashion brands should be doing with their circular model approach to sustainability. Absolutely love the design, cut and fit of their garments. Great customer care. Never been let down.

Title: Great product
Text: Great product, easy to exchange when size wrong, postage quick , good customer service.

Title: Excellent, ethical, quality.
Text: Excellent company with really good ethical approach to business. All products I’ve bought have been great quality. I love their recycling philosophy too! Keep it up!!

Title: Lovely products
Text: Lovely products. Soft cotton in great colours.

Title: Good quality tee shirts
Text: Good quality tee shirts, hard wearing and comfortable. Especially love the new thicker one. Could just do with a few more colour options.

Title: Love this brand
Text: Love this brand, guilt free clothing 😁

Title: Top quality clothing
Text: Top quality clothing,  sustainable business, great customer service....what's not to love

Title: Trust ... and I love Rapanui
Text: Well... it's all based on trust, and great fabrics, design and ethics.  I bought a rain jacket in January... for travel in tropical but wet climates.  It was perfect, held out in a flood, and it took me home.  And it looked cool! x

Title: Rapanui ~ Ethical to it's core. Plus great designs, beautiful fabrics, true to size.
Text: I have been purchasing clothing & accessories for children & adults, from Rapanui for years. I have never been less than 100% happy with the quality, fit, materials from which items are made and most importantly, the ethical foundation underpinning it's trading. I have no connection whatsoever with the company, apart from being a very satisfied customer. If you haven't already tried them, do! 5* all the way from me

Title: Quick delivery and good quality…
Text: Quick delivery and a good quality product. Have made a couple of purchases and am very happy with the quality of what I have bought

Title: Rapanui is my go to online store for…
Text: Rapanui is my go to online store for good quality, well fitting clothing, that’s sustainably produced. Delivery is prompt and reliable. The 100% cotton t-shirts, hoodies and joggers last for ages, but if they do wear out, (mine are still going strong), they can be returned free of charge in exchange for a voucher. Great way to keep clothes out of landfill.

Title: Great quality
Text: Really good quality long sleeved tee shirts. Comfortable, soft organic cotton fabric, properly long sleeves and a roomy fit. My order arrived quickly too, which is always a plus!

Title: Great quality clothes
Text: Great quality clothes and at a price comparable to anything else you find on the high street. Delivery is within a few days and in paper packaging, which is great. If you need to, returns are easy and refunds are processed quickly.

Title: Rapinui is a great company with a perfect mandate
Text: Rapinui is a great company with a perfect mandate for the planet! I love that they are committed to natural organic and/or recycled products for sustainability. But more than that I love their style combined with practicality and comfortable fabrics.  Fabulous clothes!

Title: Just read they will shut all its stores…
Text: Just read they will shut all its stores across UK. Then found out it's only closing for 24 hours for Easter Sunday.  I was excited for a second. I hate primark. Reminds me of a jumble sale or carboot sale. Clothes are draft excluders. Also can't stand Rita skank Ora. No role model.

Title: Excellent quality overshirt and casual…
Text: Excellent quality overshirt and casual trousers. Good material and style. Will use company again.

Title: Rapanui always!
Text: Rapanui make the buying experience simple and quick. I have bought t shirts, sweatshirts and socks from them for years! Always brilliant quality, built sustainably to last.

Title: A great ethical company with good…
Text: A great ethical company with good values to order from. Great products & service!

Title: 10/10 would 100% recommend
Text: Superb quality clothing, ethically made, and comfy as hell!

Title: good for the planet
Text: amazing quality,good for the planet,great design and variety

Title: The best sweatshirts ever
Text: The best sweatshirts ever, they're soft, beautifully cut and great value...with the added bonus of being gentle on our earth

Title: Great quality good value products
Text: Great quality good value products, delivered quickly in minimal packaging.

Title: Bish, bash, bosh
Text: Quality product and service to compliment the aspirational ethics.

Title: Love the ethic and aesthetic
Text: Love the ethic and aesthetic. Love the drape of the t- shirts, which are a bit unusual.

Title: Great in every way!
Text: Brilliant quality clothing, great designs, ethically produced - win, win, win 😃

Title: Been a huge fan of Rapanui for years
Text: Been a huge fan of Rapanui for years. The products they sell are brilliant, as is their mission. I absolutely love the circular economy and the ability to send back old T-shirts etc once I’ve worn them out and they can be broken back down and remade. Such an incredibly important move! On the rare occasions things haven’t fit quite right returns have been amazingly easy as well!

Title: Rapini clothes are always excellent…
Text: Rapini clothes are always excellent value. Well made and wear well and such a relief to buy from an ethical crowd of people.

Title: Love, Love, Love Lucy & Yak!
Text: Love Lucy & Yak. Love supporting their mission of sustainability, and love their service & clothing.

Title: Bought a couple of pima t-shirts from…
Text: Bought a couple of pima t-shirts from Rapanui and couple of months ago - they're the nicest quality t-shirts I've ever owned. I've since bought a couple more of the stripey t-shirts and a jumper... all just lovely quality, wash well, and so comfortable. I'm sure I'll be back for more!

Title: Definitely for me and the planet!…
Text: I like both the style and quality of all the garments I have bought from Rapanui. Their value for money is super and the ethics of the company takes some beating.

Title: Excellent quality
Text: Just received two more t shirts, excellent quality, great fit and delivered quickly in eco packaging.

Title: Doing things right
Text: Think it’s great rapanui are trying to do things the right way. More businesses need to follow their lead. Great range of clothes too

Title: Excellent company
Text: Excellent company, sustainable, good ethics, great clothes, fair prices. Nothing to dislike.

Title: Great quality clothing at a reasonable…
Text: Great quality clothing at a reasonable price.  T shirts are particularly good

Title: Superb
Text: Easy to order and  delivery prompt Quality of products is excellent Husband still wearing t shirts 5-6 years old Would never buy t shirts anywhere else Little waste, no plastic bags etc  recycling encouraged - return old items

Title: I'm with Rapanui since 2022 and I don't…
Text: I'm with Rapanui since 2022 and I don't plan to change anytime soon. Thank you!

Title: Lovely quality clothes
Text: Lovely quality clothes, nicely styled. Good service. Ethical. Love them

Title: Excellent clothing
Text: Excellent clothing. Good quality and comfortable shirts. Love the fact that you can recycle your old Rapanui clothes with the company and they make new clothes with the  material

Title: I would love to give a positive review…
Text: I would love to give a positive review as I have been buying from Rapanui for many years to support their ethical approach. However, I have now had so many poor quality items, that really don't last very long, that I can no longer consider it a sustainable choice. I also find it frustrating that when I raise a concern (ie, most recently you have sent me a jumper with a hole in it) I rarely get a reply without having to chase.

Title: Fantastic quality clothes.
Text: Fantastic quality clothes. I love my jumpers from Rapanui. The blue and green v necks are lovely and so comfy. I love Rapanui's green credentials.

Title: Love this company
Text: Love this company.  Clothes are great quality.  Returns quick and easy.  Would absolutely recommend.

Title: Great company, great quality clothes
Text: Great company, great clothes. I keep coming back. The cotton surfer towel poncho was a huge hit as a present for my family members.

Title: Quality products
Text: Quality products , great service and not costing the earth. What’s not to love ?

Title: Great quality ethical clothes business
Text: Great customer service, reliable delivery, no wasted plastic in the delivery packaging and really high quality clothes. Plus a great attitude to sustainability. Would 100% recommend.

Title: Smock, utility trousers, t shirts.
Text: Everything that I've bought from Rapanui , t shirts for my Mrs. Coats, trousers, shirts, have all been made to the best quality. Great fitting and completely original. Safe in the knowledge it's all environmentally friendly. 100% recommend.

Title: Great clothes
Text: Great clothes, great sale

Title: Great quality clothing made in a…
Text: Great quality clothing made in a sustainable way.

Title: super company!
Text: Great clothes - make up over half my wardrobe! Love all the designs. Fast postage, great customer service and a focus on sustainability.

Title: Rapanui is an ethical and high quality…
Text: Rapanui is an ethical and high quality circular producer of clothing. They have a great exchange system for when the clothes are no longer as fresh as they were. They have already been pioneering a way for a while and have influenced much of how we can buy things with minimal impact on the environment. The way they do things continues to blaze a trail and gives hope for the future.

Title: Bought some clothes for my son
Text: Bought some clothes for my son, he loves them all, material is really good quality and soft. I then bought my son in law some track bottoms and Top and he hasn’t stopped wearing them. Great company.

Title: The quality is second to none.
Text: The quality is amazing. I have purchased many items now and each item is always perfect. From underwear to winter coats ,I have absolutely nothing negative to say about any items.

Title: Rapanui - my first choice for shirts and jackets
Text: Rapanui is now my go-to choice for great quality, long-lasting T-shirts, shirts, and jackets. And when they finally wear out. I can return them free of charge for recycling and a credit.

Title: I love the ethical and sustainable…
Text: I love the ethical and sustainable stance that Rapanui have taken. Love the products. Latest joys are organic towelling beach robes used after showering in our household and the simple light design of the mens cotton hooded raincoat

Title: The guys at Rapanui completes my order…
Text: The guys at Rapanui completes my order efficiently and it arrived packed in eco friendly packaging. The t shirts are as expected and medium ordered fitted as expected. Lovely soft cotton of a nice weight.

Title: Love how the material feels on my skin
Text: I love their products and the way they feel on my skin. I'm trying to remove toxins from artificial materials entering my body and this company products are a great help. I'm a fan!

Title: Bought a lot of stuff from Rapanui over…
Text: Bought a lot of stuff from Rapanui over the years. Really good quality and great service if you need to exchange anything.

Title: Excellent Company
Text: Great company to deal with, good quality, reasonable prices. I  have bought several items of clothing for me and my family and efficient delivery too..

Title: Very happy customer
Text: I love the jacket I got, the colour, the cut, the quality, all are perfect.

Title: Self service tills
Text: Spent half of my lunch break in Drogheda choosing some items to purchase. Could not wait in Q as it was so long. Too many self service and not enough tellers. Have had to stop shopping in penneys during the week for this reason

Title: Awful
Text: Awful, cannot speak to anyone in customer service. Ordered my items a week ago and no update. The website states delivery within 5 days. Absolute lies!! I want my money back you scammers.

Title: Exceptionally helpful & efficient…
Text: Exceptionally helpful & efficient service. Actually the best customer service experience I think I’ve ever had from a retailer! Awesome - massive thanks 🤩

Title: Finisterre customer service is exceptional!
Text: Finisterre customer service is exceptional! I had an issue with some trousers I purchased over a month after I had bought them. The response was superb..I was given a range of options to resolve the situation, (I went for an exchange), and within a few days the replacement was on its way. I also received a gift card covering the difference in price between the two items. Every time I have contacted their customer service or requested information from one of the shops I have been impressed at their response..the best and friendliest help I have received for many years.

Title: Outstanding customer service
Text: I was simply blown away by your outstanding customer service recently, I felt compelled to write and thank you. My husband bought me a gilet back in 2024, and recently the piping started coming away from the fleece. I emailed customer services with photos, and was immediately offered either a repair or a replacement at a similar price. I opted for a new one and returned the damaged gilet. I was kept constantly updated throughout the process. Even though my size was out of stock, they went above and beyond to track one down at their Bath store and send it to me. This level of care, a full year after purchase, is truly exceptional. I’m so impressed and will forever be a loyal Finisterre customer. Simply incredible! Thank you!

Title: awesome!
Text: really awesome and friendly customer service, and a great product

Title: Fantastic service in the St Ives store…
Text: Visited the St Ives store this weekend a couple of times and the service was absolutely superb. Friendly, helpful and they really look after the customers. Love Finisterre products and the team in the St Ives store are a real credit to the brand.

Title: New to this brand but definitely a returning customer
Text: New to this brand but definitely a returning customer. Great quality at a reasonable price. Had to speak to customer service for small issue. Lovely, friendly staff who dealt with email promptly and the issue was dealt within the day. Cannot recommend both company and products highly enough.

Title: WORST COMPANY EVER
Text: WORST COMPANY EVER! Not even worth one star. Do not order!! Has now been taken over by Shein. Takes forever to arrive even though it says 5 working days. Quality is horrendous. No item is as described. They have a ridiculous return process that they do not respond to. Been waiting since November for a refund! Absolute joke!

Title: Really rate the service from Finisterre…
Text: Really rate the service from Finisterre and it's a big reason I return to them. Any issues are resolved super quick and they make it so easy for you!

Title: Absolute crap
Text: Absolute crap, over £100 on shit that comes off shein, nothings the right size, looks like costume clothing. Waste of money and time.

Title: Finisterre Helpdesk
Text: I had an issue with a jumper that was handled in a professional way. Hats off for the immediate response by email and resolving it in such a patient, understanding and friendly manner. My special thanks go to Sophie from the Finisterre helpdesk!!

Title: Where is my order!
Text: Terrible experience! Paid via PayPal and they have no option of contacting them if you are not a registered member on their website! I ordered 3 weeks ago and no update that it’s been dispatched at all and no way of contacting them! SHAMELESS and DISGRACEFUL. This is actually fraud!!!

Title: Excellent customer service in St Agnes and Bath
Text: We recently bought two jumpers and a coat in the St Agnes branch where the assistant was friendly, knowledgeable and helpful. She fetched a coat from the stockroom that wasn't on display, and then ordered one in a different colour from another branch. This was unfortunately too small, but someone at the Bath branch was then just as helpful in ordering a larger size, which was sent as promptly as the first. I'm very happy with the coat and we also love our new jumpers.

Title: Exemplary customer service
Text: Exemplary customer service. They really go above and beyond. Would absolutely shop with them again - Especially with such wonderful customer service. Thanks all.

Title: I’m giving 5 stars because my issue was…
Text: I’m giving 5 stars because my issue was resolved!  I sent back some items recently and when I got my refund I only received it on part of my return. I emailed and they replied pretty quickly and confirmed they had only received part of my return when I sent it all! I kept my receipt from the post office which by weight confirmed by the weight that I’d sent everything. Full refund was issued. Scary moment but all resolved. So happy. Just abit sad that happened. I have since returned other bits with no issues

Title: My favorite clothing brand
Text: They are an excellent sustainable clothing brand. I appreciate everything they do in terms of sustainability and ethics. They are very transparent and trustworthy. Some of their prints fade a bit too quickly. The quality of their clothing has been going downhill recently.

Title: Headtopay 30€ for the Return No…
Text: Headtopay 30€ for the Return No Customer Service!!!

Title: Careful with the Essence brand products - allergy r
Text: I bought this last week and have had the worst experience of my life. My face and neck turned red and burned. Stupidly, I gave it another try the next day because I wasn't sure the issue was this, and guess what? Again, the same problem. Because my skin was already sensitive, it has been 3 days now, and I still have my face red in some areas, and it is very itchy. Be careful….

Title: Amazing customer service
Text: Finisterre resolved a product issue had super fast and were very communicative and kind through the process

Title: Love Finisterre
Text: The designs are great, the fabric top quality and I’d like to buy it all please! Called customer service and Milan was so friendly and helpful. Altogether a fab company!!

Title: Wish I knew and read the new reviews…
Text: Wish I knew and read the new reviews that this was sold on to SHEIN and the delay in shipping - it has been nearly 2 weeks now and no update on the parcel. Including paying shipping costs. Loved missguided before but will completely avoid in future. Following on the parcel Finally did arrive and the items are shocking such poorly quality and an awful chemical smell - nothing at all like the pictures at all and after reading the reviews now for the returns process going to take this one on the chin and accept failure on my part! Just really disappointing as it use to be so good. The advice I give is to Avoid!

Title: Above and Beyond Customer Service
Text: Getting customer service right is one of the hardest things to do. Do it right, and they have a customer who will tell everyone who will listen how well they have been treated. Thanks again. PS wearing a pair as I write!

Title: Good customer service
Text: Kat went out of her way to sort an issue I had (no fault of L&Y nor mine) but it was resolved super quickly. Thanks Kat!

Title: Don’t use this company. I want to return my order they make it…
Text: I want to return my order they make it impossible. Do not use them the clothes are bad quality. You can’t contact them. I phoned to be cut off several times. My account with them shows no order  so I have no order no so can not get any information to return my order.  Do Not Use Them

Title: Nightmare returns policy
Text: So I had no idea about Missguided going into liquidation in 2022 and now work with Shein. I would never have come on here if I decided that I wanted to keep the jacket which is nice , lined etc but I decided nearly £40 was just a bit much when I didn’t really need it. So was going to send back. Instantly when I went through the refund process, they took off £7 from what I paid and said I’d get just over £30 back. I thought they’d send a shipping label for postage, they don’t, you have to write it on yourself I think then pay for the postsge?! Tbh I’m completely confused what I have to do and by reading all the 1 star reviews on here I can’t believe how many people have not been refunded after returning their order. So I’m not returning the jacket as it looks like a nightmare and I probably wouldn’t get my money back less very expensive postage!! Terrible customer service.

Title: Top notch overall
Text: Top notch services, and high quality clothes. They helped me with my return issue I faced immediately and that helped a lot.

Title: Mega !
Text: No mater if it´s from the website or in store, it’s always a perfect experience. High quality items, friendly staff, and problems solved quickly (only happened once but customer service is top notch ! See you soon

Title: Returns
Text: Had to return a pair of jeans. The process went smoothly even with the re activation of a voucher. One of the assistants realised I need a petite size as I’m 5’2” and produced a pair of the same style which fitted perfectly. Very professional, very happy me!

Title: The return process is really tedious…
Text: The return process is really tedious like the other reviewers already have said. It is also costly. I had to figure out how to do it myself as their instruction is unclear. If anyone wants to know in case they didn't reply about the return, you have to "send" the parcel to their return address. So rather than "returning" it, you are "sending" the parcel to a recipient. On the EVRI website, I had to add the address and everything else myself and pay for the parcel myself, which cost me around £7. Then go back onto the Missguided website and enter the tracking number from the EVRI label. Saying that, I did receive my refund within a week of sending the parcel minus the shipping cost.

Title: Dear Lucy & Yak Team,
Text: Dear Lucy & Yak Team, I wanted to share my heartfelt thanks for the genuinely wonderful experience I had at your paint workshop in the Spitalfields Market pop-up on Friday 23rd January @ 11-1. From the moment I arrived, your team made me feel so welcome — especially Joe, the store manager, and Marina, his cheerful and approachable assistant. When the workshop started a little late, Marina immediately put us at ease, invited us to look around the beautiful store and greeted everyone with a warm, friendly smile. When Joe arrived, he couldn’t have been more apologetic and attentive. He took the time to explain how the workshop would run, asked if we needed anything, and listened when I explained how nervous I was about painting on my special work dungarees. Rather than dismissing my concern, he kindly offered me a practice tote bag, even asking what colour I preferred — such a thoughtful touch. His reassuring, patient, and genuinely caring manner — along with bringing us paints and offering cold drinks — made the afternoon truly special. Joe checked in at just the right moments to be supportive without hovering. I had the best couple of hours; I felt confident, creative, and genuinely happy — something I really needed after a tough week. This experience has given me the confidence to personalise my Lucy & Yak dungarees and aprons with my own designs, and I couldn’t be more delighted with what I created. See photos attached. Please could you pass this message on to head office and to Joe, and let him know how much his kindness and encouragement meant to me? I’d also love for Marina to be recognised for her warm, bright energy — her smile really sets the tone for a welcoming experience.

Title: Shocking!!
Text: Shocking!!! Did not know missguided was now shein. Took an age to arrive which I wasn't warned about, every item was that awful cheap shiny material, not as described AT ALL then to top it off have to pay to return, and follow a ridiculous amount of steps to prove I have done so! I wish I saw these reviews first!! Will absolutely never use again and do not recommend. AVOID

Title: Awful quality and NO RETURN PORTAL
Text: Wish I'd read these reviews before ordering! The clothes are not just terrible quality (I've since found out Missguided were bought out by SHEIN so that's probably why), I had the exact same problem as others - THERE IS NO RETURN PORTAL. You have to go to a courier website and pay to send (not return - send) the parcel back to them. This includes figuring out weight, dimensions, insuring it to the value of the order, etc. - things that would (and should) all be handled by a professional return portal like on, I don't know, EVERY OTHER CLOTHING RETAILER'S WEBSITE. Having now read the reviews and seen others don't actually get their money back after returning, I'll save myself the additional return cost (which is nearly £10 FYI - usually no more than about £4 deducted from other retailers), and try to resell these shoddy items secondhand to recoup some of my cost. I'm shocked tbh - this used to be a good shop, and now its unprofessional and sweatshop-esque. I highly recommend you DO NOT BUY.

Title: Had an issue with shrinkage
Text: Had an issue with shrinkage, customer service were super helpful - solution focused, prompt to respond and clear communication.

Title: Fantastic Finisterre
Text: Finisterre provided a perfect customer experience. Where I had an product issue; they were responsive, fast acting, helpful and compassionate. I already thought highly of them as a business / retailer, and recent experience has further reinforced how terrific they are to deal with as a customer.

Title: Wish I could give no stars
Text: Wish I could give no stars. I ordered a pair of jeans for my daughter over a month ago, they haven't arrived. Shoppers beware, wouldn't touch them with a barge pole total scam 😒

Title: Emily was prompt and very…
Text: Emily was prompt and very professional.Thanks yakkers team 😊 🌺

Title: Thanks to the Cambridge store
Text: The website had run out of a jumper, ina colour, I wanted and I was told there'd be no further stock. I used the "Check store availability" option - Cambridge had one in so I emailed them. Got a reply straightaway from James who put one aside for me - rang them up and Holly sent it out - it arrived the next morning. Happy Days! Thanks guys :-).

Title: Returns Nightmare — Still No Refund
Text: I’ve been a Missguided customer for years and never had major issues until now. I recently returned a dress due to poor quality and bad fit. I followed their returns process exactly, met all criteria, sent the item back, and kept both postage and tracking receipts. However, their returns portal repeatedly failed when uploading the required images. I contacted customer service multiple times via chat and email, but there is no way to speak to a real person. I only received automated or error responses, with no resolution. Missguided have the returned item and my money, yet I still haven’t received a refund. Being stuck in an endless loop of chasing is completely unacceptable. I would not recommend ordering from them.

Title: Excellent overall
Text: Excellent customer service at Ashley Cross branch in Poole. Knowledgable staff and great to deal with. Nice layout in the shop and everything is easy to find.

Title: Exeter store
Text: Exeter store. Messy.Untidy, Leaks from ceiling with buckets everywhere.Long queues, changing rooms -1 closed.Went to ground floor changing rooms with large section signposted 'women' and tiny section on right signposted 'unisex'.So why is there no sign for men? Disgusting! and a lot of disgruntled customers sharing same view and staff had no answers.

Title: Excellent customer support
Text: I ordered a jumper and unfortunately there were a few hiccups along the way with receiving it. However, the customer service provided was exceptional and they went above and beyond to rectify the issue. I would be happy to shop with them again.

Title: Recently visited the Castleford…
Text: Recently visited the Castleford Freeport store with my daughter and  purchased items for my daughter who has nothing but praise for the design and quality of the clothes. My daughter loved the wide range and value for money, with the assistant being extremely helpful, sorry didn't get her name.

Title: Not the quality I was expecting
Text: I bought a women’s rollneck jumper in a medium, and it was absolutely huge and a poor fit. The rollneck looked nothing like it did on the presumably tall model. I am  a petite size 12 and ended up looking more like a cross between a Telly Tubby and Scoobie Doo’s Thelma! For the price, I think there are better brands out there such as Hush or Toast. The jumper was well made, but quite rough to the touch and a little on the frumpy side for a £130 plus paid.

Title: Exceptional Customer Service
Text: Seldom leave reviews but here goes.  As a hillwalker, dog walker, and all round outdoors enthusiast, I've bought a lot of clothing and gear online over the years.  But never from Finisterre. That changed when my adult stepson hinted that he was a big fan of the company and would appreciate a new waterproof jacket for an imminent Birthday. And so it was I purchased a Stormbird jacket online last week.  Not the cheapest garment on the market perhaps but I was reassured by previous reviews here. Unfortunately there was a glitch with delivery that led me to contact with  Customer Services.  The problem was explained and resolved within minutes.  Both the agent who took my all and Jack, the Customer Services Manager, were instrumental in making this happen.  They went above and beyond.  My boy's delighted with it. I'm now considering a new Finisterre jacket for myself.

Title: Fast response with resolution of query
Text: Fast response with resolution of query

Title: Difficult to return items
Text: Really difficult to return item and you have to pay postage yourself. No return label provided. Bad experience

Title: Loved the Finisterre shop in Leeds
Text: Loved the Finisterre shop in Leeds. The store looks great and everything feels really high quality. The staff were super friendly and helpful, which made the whole experience even better. Just a really nice place to shop, would definitely recommend and I will be back again.

Title: Faulty Boots…
Text: Purchased a pair of boots end of September. Not worn til Nov & complete sole has cracked. Took them back to Primark Belfast city centre. Didn't have receipt but showed bank statement which manager didn't even bother to look at. She offered me £3  refund for boots I had paid £20. She said I wasn't entitled to full refund as didn't have receipt. I brought boots back home as wouldn't accept £3 for them. I'm not a happy customer at all. Definitely won't be buying footwear from them again if this is way they go after 2 months wear.

Title: Don't bother ordering
Text: Items came from China so didn't receive them in time for the event I wanted them for. Returned one of the items on 11/01, had to pay to return the item through Evri. They have confirmed the return but Misguided still haven't confirmed it or refunded the money. Just to add insult to injury I did pay in 3 through Klarna, they duplicated my payment plan so I have paid double. Have been backwards and forwards with Klarna and misguided and they both just sending me to the other. Won't order from misguided again.

Title: Truly awful
Text: Truly awful, no way of returning a dress that arrived late with super low quality. Awful, lost 100 pounds

Title: Very helpful and friendly team with…
Text: Very helpful and friendly team with timely response.

Title: Quick and satisfying resolution
Text: Quick response to the issue, solved easily and efficiently. Clear communication and friendly team. Thanks.

Title: I will never order from here again
Text: I will never order from here again. I ordered from Canada and the parcel went to Jamaica and back to store. I never received parcel and had to pay for the 50$ to ship to Jamaica and back to store. Never had a company do that. Disappointed kid and money lost.

Title: Terrible experience, still awaiting refund 6 months later
Text: Terrible experience - placed a large order but had to return all but one thing due to faulty stitching, poor quality and inconsistent sizing. Had to pay for the return postage myself (which was nearly £15), Missguided promised to reimburse this but sent it to the wrong PayPal account and refused to correct their mistake. Missguided used to be great but since being taken over by SHEIN it’s terrible.

Title: Bath store and online chat.
Text: Used both the online chat and called the store located in Bath. Online chat was fantastic helping track down a top I was after and giving me the details of were it was available. Called the store in Bath and the lady I spoke to was amazing really helpful and friendly a real credit to the brand and store and I will be definitely buying from this brand  again .

Title: Do not buy from here .I sent back 3…
Text: Do not  buy from here .I sent back 3 item  which was signed  for  and never  got refund.  So no reply to my emails

Title: All good!
Text: Quick reply, nice communication, helped me directly and the dungarees I got are amazing!

Title: What Happened?
Text: First time using Missguided since they were bought by Shein. Delivery has so far taken THREE WEEKS. Never again. A once trusted brand is now a shambles.

Title: Responsive and supportive
Text: I complained about the quality of a fleece I had for Christmas. The team were great and sent me a credit note. Thankyou!

Title: A huge thank you!
Text: I just want to say a huge thank you to Finisterre Customer Service for your response by return when my parcel went missing. I wanted the jumper for a particular event and was so disappointed it had gone missing on delivery. Finisterre Customer Service responded immediately and the replacement item arrived in time for the event.  Honestly, so grateful! Thank you so much!

Title: Effective, quick and kindest crew
Text: Love the brand and their products. The crew is always quick in solving any issues with so much kindness and understanding. I really felt considered and helped by contacting them, even though I’m not from the uk and my English can be uneven sometimes.

Title: Too Small…
Text: My Daughter and I bought a box of Knickers each. Same Boxes, same size different Colours (4 pairs per box). Her ones are so obviously bigger than mine and sized correctly. Mine are too small. A return Taxi to take them back would not be cost effective. Disappointed

Title: I bought thermals for men from primark…
Text: I bought thermals for men from primark and let me say they are worth every penny. I went fishing in them for a day and passed wind at roughly 1230 pm in them. It was only at about 1530 when I got home and stripped off that it hit me. I was kept warm and dry and reminded when I got home of the quality of the said garments . Top warmth and comfort , would recommend

Title: The service I received was impeccable…
Text: The service I received was impeccable and incredibly timely. Superb.

Title: What a terrible customer service
Text: What a terrible customer service. Hard tp create a return. Impossible to get in touch with customer services. Sent over 2 days few messages on Facebook no one looked at it or try to help. I am blocking the site it’s so MISSGUIDED LOL CRAP COMPANY STAY AWAY FROM THEM

Title: Nebulas Insulated Jacket
Text: I bought Nebulas, which is claimed to be their 1warmest insulated jacket, built for lasting adventures in the coldest temperatures". Unfortunately, I was very disappointed to find that it's not as warm as advertised. I was wearing this jacket in 0°C with a jumper and t-shirt underneath, and I still felt pretty cold – most winter coats should be able to handle this temperature. Another thing they claim is that the jacket is breathable. Well, I was wearing it indoors for a few minutes, and it felt unbearable and made me very sweaty. Seems like this jacket only makes you warm when you don't need it. I was surprised because this jacket has very good reviews on their website, but then I realised why. I wanted to review the jacket on their website, but there is no option for that. Apparently, you can only review items via link that will be sent to your email, but since I bought the jacket in a physical store, I didn't receive any link. When contacting the customer support, they said no refunds after the item has been worn. But how could I possiblty test it without wearing it at least for one day?

Title: Women’s Skye waterproof parker
Text: This was out of stock online so I contacted customer services and they tracked one down for me in one of the stores, Dean in the Poole store got it posted out to me straight away. Lovely coat, looking forward to testing it out. Excellent customer service, thank you.

Title: Nebulas coat is amazing
Text: I have 27 years military service, a further 10 as lifeboat crew, I'm definitely an outdoor type of bloke. It's the best damn coat ever! Never had a better one. I swore by my buffalo coat but your coat killed it. Comfortable, light, great fit. The colour is lovely (orange). Worn it every day for 2 weeks, lovely and warm and in my opinion quite well waterproof. I've walked my Lab Rosie is all weather and never got wet underwear. Also Becky and Jack in customer service are amazing. A true credit to your brand. Lifeboat crew discount is a very nice touch. Thank you.

Title: Honesty of shop staff
Text: During the afternoon of Tuesday I was returning and purchasing some clothing from the Finisterre shop in St Ives Cornwall. I paid in cash and counted out 200 pounds sterling in cash(new notes)and checked it again before I handed over the cash to the shop staff. I was chatting to my wife and looking around at some of the other stuff and the shop staff alerted me to the fact that I had given them £20.00 to much. Well done to them and a credit to the finisterre team. Also knowledgable about the products in the store.

Title: Great customer service
Text: I was initially really pleased with the jumper I received but noticed it has a small hole along a seam. I got into the team and they were very helpful and understanding and sent me out a replacement straight away. Love the style of the clothing and feels like it will last a lifetime.

Title: Poor quality of item and customer service
Text: Poor quality of item and customer service. I ordered a skirt which was damaged when it arrived (had a rip down the seam). The parcel came in SHEIN packaging which I was surprised about as I wasn’t aware that miss guided were now getting their clothing from SHEIN. It took ages to come too so I think it got shipped from china. I asked for a refund due to the damaged item which they were happy to give me a ‘100% refund’ - however, they only refunded me what I paid for the item and not the £4.99 shipping fee. I don’t expect to lose out on money when I receive a damaged item, but they are refusing to refund me shipping costs despite the damaged item.

Title: Mora jumper is the best
Text: Mora jumper is the best. The new merino wool mora sweater is very warm for it's weight because it is quite tightly knitted. Perfect layer and quality

Title: Amazing Customer Service
Text: Well, what can I say, had a fault with an item and from 1st response after emailing customer service to resolution, every touch point was exemplary. Communication second to none, I first emailed on a Friday, return sorted and new item posted by Tuesday morning. No arguments, no back and forth, just good old fashioned customer service!! I've purchased many Finesterre items and just goes to show, their ethos stretches much further than their environmental credentials..its their mantra and will definitely continue to use and enjoy their products!! Special shout out to Ali who made the whole process easy!!

Title: I had a problem with my ticket because…
Text: I had a problem with my ticket because I put in the wrong email address when I emailed I’ve got a lovely response. Emily was brilliant and I’d highly recommend using this service. I’m looking forward to attending the craft event in Norwich.

Title: Don't hold your breath for a refund. Useless.
Text: Quality is fine. However you try and speak to somebody. I returned one item over a month ago. They confirmed it back and stated they will refund. 1 month later I am still struggling to get my money back. They say it is busy! then they say they will flag it to management. I don't get a response so i chase again. I still do not get a refund and then they say they will check with royal mail ( even though they sent an email saying they have it back). Useless customer service as you cannot get through on the phone either unless you want to buy something.

Title: Great customer service
Text: Great customer service after order went missing. My order was replaced and sent to me straight away

Title: Above and Beyond
Text: My wife and I have long been fans of Finisterre's products: she loves the long lasting quality, fit and warmth of their  clothing, whilst I (too fat to squeeze into their men's clothing sizes) delight in their woollen socks for all-year-round wear.   Buying a Lapwing Jacket for my wife online recently, I could not get a discount voucher (which Finisterre had sent me) to work.  I messaged customer service, who quickly responded with a straightforward solution involving buying the jacket at full price and being refunded the discounted amount.  I did so, and - at 8:40 pm (they're supposed to close at 5 pm!) - received an email from Jack at customer service to let me know that the refund had been made (I checked; it had).  He also offered a glimmer of hope that they might before long be expanding the range of available sizes to accommodate fat slobs like me - although Jack was far too polite to put it that way; thanks, Jack!  Joking aside; this encapsulates what we like about Finisterre.  They go above and beyond run-of-the-mill outfitters in the quality of their products and their customer service.

Title: quick response
Text: quick response alternative offered

Title: They are such a scam
Text: They are such a scam , the price of the products double when added to the cart and when u contact them they answer only by email with random text, just be aware about the price they are such a big scam I sent them screenshots of the products with the prices and they still lying, so disappointing, I was not aware on my first order so for sure I was scammed with the cost At least the shipping was ok

Title: Decent experience
Text: Good quality clothes for fair prices. Have bought from Lucy & Yak 5+ times without any issues.

Title: Outstanding quality and even better customer service
Text: Outstanding quality and even better customer service. Finisterre’s clothing is brilliantly made. Durable, warm and clearly designed for real-world weather, not just looks. On top of that, their customer service has been genuinely excellent: responsive, helpful and a pleasure to deal with. Rare to find a brand that delivers both great products and great service!! Highly recommended. Thanks guys.

Title: SUPER CUSTOMER SERVICE THANK YOU
Text: Very helpful customer service. Looking forward to receiving the jumper

Title: Used to be a good company terrible…
Text: Used to be a good company terrible service not completing refund taking weeks to get anywhere. Pretty much a scammer company now.

Title: Great customer service
Text: Great customer service. I ordered several pairs of socks as a gift for Christmas. There was a problem with the sizing that were sent. I sent an e mail explaining my issue. The customer service received was superb. Very quick response. Issue resolved. I would highly recommend their products. I’ve never had any issues before but the customer service was amazing.

Title: Awesome customer service from Ali and…
Text: Awesome customer service from Ali and the team – I had a couple of queries about a product and they got back to me super quickly and sorted me out. Thanks! ☺️

Title: First time customer
Text: First time customer. Item came super speedy and is AMAZING! Very happy and will undoubtedly be back.

Title: Disgraceful exchange policy
Text: Disgraceful exchange policy, especially when only wanted to change size of a gents fleece that was bought as a gift. We were told no exchange allowed. Primark need to review there policy.

Title: Excellent help but more needed!
Text: Excellent help from my contact email, though sadly the style I had asked for is discontinued.  I was advised to advertise on L & Y “in search of” Facebook page but I found it impossible to know how to put the template into a post. Some more guidance for the less able technically would be appreciated.

Title: Great customer service
Text: Excellent customer service (from Milan) who supported me with personalised and detailed guidance regarding sizes and models. I was ordering from the other side of the world and so didn’t want to be dealing with returning items because they didn’t fit.  Product is great - Long Jane wetsuit perfect for diving in tropical waters.

Title: I accidentally put an old address in…
Text: I accidentally put an old address in for the shipping address, I then emailed the company immediately and Hannah was very quick to respond.

Title: Size was too big for my grand daughter
Text: Size was too big for my grand daughter, the matter was resolved without any fuss and very quickly. Unfortunately you were sold out for this item , so a very speedy refund was given .thankyou

Title: Always been very happy with both the…
Text: Always been very happy with both the items and the service.

Title: Excellent ethical clothing company…
Text: Excellent ethical clothing company comprising of high quality gear.

Title: WARNING DO NOT BUY
Text: Ordered what was advertised as a jumpsuit from what I thought was a local website. Shipping took over 2 weeks as its actually coming from China. I opened the package today inside was one tracksuit TOP,( not even a full jumpsuit!!!! )made of cheap swimsuit type fabric. For over £20.00 it unbearable quality. I want to return it but the process seems very inaccessible and difficult. May have to just count it as a loss.

Title: Five star customer service
Text: I’ve been looking at this store for years and my first time in contact with their customer support was after receiving a gift of yaks that were unfortunately too small. However their support (specifically Hannah!) could not have been any more helpful - even with the little amount of details I had to give about the order, they easily set up the exchange/return for me. Such a lovely, great team behind such a great brand :)

Title: Extremely disappointed with L&Y
Text: Extremely disappointed with L&Y! Went on to the app to order from their sale Boxing Day morning, found lots of items at incredible price of £14, so added them to my basket, however when I went to check out the prices of 3 of the items increased from £14 to anywhere between £26-42!! When I complained to L&Y they said it was a “glitch” but that they were entitled change pricing at any point, including when items are in your basket or going through the payment process. I feel this is a case of using algorithms to assess when lots of items are being bought they increase prices? Expected much more from an ‘ethical company’ 😞

Title: E mails to entice you to look
Text: E mails to entice you to look At the sale .  Items at £14 duly added to basket , go to check out and the price has gone back to £42 .. when questioned was directed to the small print that they are able to change prices at any given time even if in your basket . The algorithm working at its finest I’d say . Very disingenuous sale practice .

Title: Appalling
Text: Did an online click and collect order 10 December to collect on 18 December money taken from my bank straight away then bounced back in 2days later contacted customer service twice who were no help whatsoever couldn’t tell me wether it was out of stock surely stock is allocated to you when you do click and collect they didn’t have that information this was the first and last time I will use primark click and collect received an email on Christmas Eve your parcel is ready to collect then several emails stating I had 1 day left to collect another you have 3days ???? Never had such a bad experience with any other company with click and collect if I could give less than 1 star I would .

Title: Amazing service
Text: Amazing service. Didn't feel Like your typical corporation. I had an issue eith my girlfriends order and someone from the team sorted it asap. During Christmas.

Title: Scammy
Text: This website has turned scammy AF. Clothes arrived in Shein bags!! But no mention of it on the site. Dishonest..

Title: Had issues with needing to return an…
Text: Had issues with needing to return an item and staff was super helpful and responsive to emails. Got issue resolved quickly. Items that I received were great just needed a different size.

Title: Excellent chat support
Text: Excellent chat support. Advisor Pearl resolved my refund issue promptly and professionally. Outstanding customer service that ensures I'll return for future assistance.

Title: You’ll pay to return. Quality is the WORST
Text: Zero stars. The quality is the poorest ever! I ordered 5 items totalling about $100. The photos doesn’t even come close to the actual items. The fabric is the worst. I MEAN THE WORST. I wouldn’t order from this shop. You’ll end up having to pay for returns. I paid $20+ trying to return the items. Mind you the address they send you to delivery the items isn’t even accurate per UPS. The zip code is all wrong. I’d rather spend $100 on 1 item with great quality than 5 items that’ll go straight to the trash anyway.

Title: Lucy & Yak were recommended to me by my…
Text: Lucy & Yak were recommended to me by my daughter. I’ve been very pleased with the items I’ve purchased, returns and queries have been dealt with promptly. I will be ordering again.

Title: Ella from Lucy and Yak and and honestly…
Text: Ella from Lucy and Yak and and honestly deserves all the praise for helping me with so quickly with this order, the type of service you usually wait a week for, shout out Ella!

Title: Prompt resolution to delivery issues
Text: There was an issue with the delivery from Royal Mail. When I contacted Lucy & Yak for help they were extremely prompt in resolving the issue. I was very impressed with their customer service and would happily shop with the again as a result!

Title: Excellent customer service
Text: Excellent service from Finisterre. After my waterproof jacket unfortunately perished inside after 2 years of use, I got in touch asking about their repair service. Whilst ideally I’d have liked the item repaired, they instead offered me a new replacement in my choice of colour. As a customer I felt valued - so top marks to Finisterre.

Title: I am extremely disappointed with…
Text: I am extremely disappointed with Missguided’s customer service. I want to return my clothes for a refund because the quality is very poor. However, returning them has been made practically impossible Missguided provided me with the following return address: DC-1, Logistyczna 1A, 05-090 Katy Wroclawskie, Ramp 35 The problem is that the postal code does not match the city. I checked this with multiple postal services, and the postal code does not exist for that location. I sent Missguided clear evidence showing that the address and postal code do not match. Despite this, they keep insisting the postal code is correct and simply tell me to “try a different postal provider.” I did, several providers, and none of them recognize this address with that postal code. Instead of correcting the address or offering an alternative solution, customer service keeps ignoring the issue and repeating the same response. At this point, it feels like they are deliberately preventing me from returning the items so they don’t have to issue a refund. Has anyone been able to figure out their postal code? Very poor quality products and even worse customer service. I would not recommend ordering from Missguided if you expect any support with returns or refunds

Title: Ordered online with click and collect…
Text: Ordered online with click and collect because they didn't have in stock in store. Then I get an email 3 days later telling me sorry item out of stock so we have refunded. Come on Primark it's 2025 get your stock sorted! No excuse for selling online and then not having stock in the warehouse. Very disappointed. Every other company in the world has managed to get live inventory why can't you!

Title: Exceptional
Text: I have always rated Finisterre as a brand, and this experience reinforced why. I had an issue with sizing consistency on a Barents jumper, where two jumpers of the same model and size fitted noticeably differently. I raised it with customer services, provided photos, and the team dealt with it promptly, professionally, and without fuss. They acknowledged the issue, arranged a free return using a simple Royal Mail QR code, and immediately organised a replacement in the correct size. Communication was clear throughout, and the tone was genuinely customer-focused rather than defensive. Issues can happen with any clothing brand, but how they are handled matters. Finisterre handled this properly, quickly, and fairly. It is exactly the sort of service that builds long-term trust, and I will happily continue buying from them.

Title: Confusing info about issuing refunds
Text: Edit: I did receive a full refund before the ten days. Not sure whether the message I’d received was a mistake? However, the sizing was off and the jumper was somewhat disappointing, for the price. The customer service on the phone before I returned the jumper was good and helpful. Original review: I bought a jumper online using their sizing guide. It came up far too big and I returned it. Several days later I received notification that my return had been accepted and that it would take up to TEN BUSINESS DAYS to receive a refund - that might not be as much as the price I paid. I have no idea why it takes this long and would be reluctant to buy online from Finisterre again because of this. The jumper itself wasn’t great :(. Very scratchy and not worth £120, sadly.

Title: For dog walkingOne of the reasons I bought the long…
Text: One of the reasons I bought the long waking coat was to take the dogs out in wet weather. Just been out in heavy rain the coat has poor breathable qualities under garments wet after only a few miles.

Title: Lucy&Yack outlet
Text: Staff at the junction 32 castleford outlet are absolutely amazing! They go out of their way to provide great customer service also to add the shop layout is perfect for those in wheelchairs/prams no bumping into one another. Each time I’ve gone they are always so welcoming and if you don’t want want to talk they give you space. The re-yak system is amazing when you want to get something new but don’t know what to do with your old stuff. Definitely recommend going to the outlet each time you go it’s always changing it up!! Even some of the new pieces online can be in shop👀

Title: Would never have ordered had i realised…
Text: Would never have ordered had i realised it was coming from China, ordered 28th Nov and today 13th Dec still not here, going abroad tomorrow so unable to take anything I ordered.

Title: I'm so glad that I found Lucy&Yak
Text: I'm so glad that I found Lucy&Yak, I've been looking for new trousers with little luck when a friend said" try Lucy&Yak". I didn't find trousers but did find exactly the pinafore dress that I've been looking for for ages and I'll definitely be shopping with them again. It's refreshing to find great quality, well made and uniquely designed clothes.The sizing is true to size and sensible, love the organic cotton and the ethical and sustainable ethos of the company. I've been very impressed with the excellent communication and the speed of dispatch and delivery. As a new customer I wasn't sure which size to buy but it has been so easy to return items and exchange for a different size and they were most helpful when I did email with a problem, replying quickly.It has been a pleasure to shop with them and I'm absolutely delighted with my new clothes. Thank you Lucy&Yak.

Title: Quality products and service!
Text: Love this unique brand. Quality products and service! Unfortunately, Royal Mail lost my package, but as soon as I let L&Y know, we agreed to wait for the end of the week to see if it would turn up (unfortunately it didn't), I let them know on Friday AM and by the next day I had my replacement item! Very impressed with Adam's great service and that of the team.

Title: Historic problem arising sorted quickly and helpfully
Text: I had some problems with my PayPal account and didn’t recognise this Company. Turns out I had sent an E-voucher to a relative some months ago - birthday present. Showed my daughter the website and she said “That would have been ***** Mum” and she was right. I contacted them, they had sent me full details of the voucher and were amazingly helpful. Plus my relative has now been pleased and used the voucher!

Title: Super service.
Text: Super service. They reacted very quick by email. Not a robot but a real person. The clothes are super too! Glad with Lucy and Yak.

Title: Highly recommend
Text: First visit to this store in Ashley Cross in Poole and very impressed . Amazing space , in an old school conversion .Helpful, knowledgeable staff and quality products . Really hope they do well here . We’ll definitely be back,  thank you !

Title: Worth every penny
Text: as always, whenever an issue, they go out of their way to fix it. I am very impressed not only with the clothing, but the customer service that carries on after. Yes you may think the clothing is expensive, but it's well made, lasts forever and is such a worthwile investment on a permanent and hardwearing item.

Title: Amazing service to fix broken zip puller
Text: My zip puller broke on my raincoat and I contacted customer service. They quickly offered me three options, one of which was a free repair. I popped into the London store on Neal St and the the most wonderful Ruth fixed it there an then. It took less than 5 minutes. I'm so grateful for the rapid and simple way Finisterre has handled this. Amazing service.

Title: Bracknell - rude
Text: Bracknell - rude staff at changing area.  The signs in the shop need to be addressed to indicate if it’s male or female or mixed.

Title: Good, but lacks transparency
Text: Ok, so Missguided is now owned by Shein but of course there is no transparency on the website thus what you are ordering on misguided is actually coming from China.  Honestly I have to say, I love Shein on the whole albeit, you have to check a lot of reviews to ensure what you are buying is decent quality.  I would therefore recommend that anything you choose to purchase from missguided, you search for this on the parent website where not only will you get a cheaper price it will also ensure you get to see reviews about the overall quality of the item.  I am literally only giving 3 stars due to the lack of transparency on the Missguided website about where the items ship from, resulting in bad reviews due to long shipping times and some items being lower quality than that advertised with no reviews to show the item from other buyer perspectives.  Do your homework when purchasing and trust me, you will find some quality items but be aware the wait can be longer than expected.

Title: Do NOT use
Text: Bought a dress for £38. When it arrived it was a cheap Shein dress. Tried to refund and they dont accept returns. Disgusting, stole my money

Title: Great service
Text: Great service. They sorted out an issue without fuss. I was able to contact them by email, and got a label replacement sent in the post free of charge. The couldn't have bee more helpful.

Title: Gorgeous clothing, great team!
Text: The team behind Lucy & Yak are fantastic! One of my parcels was lost in the postal system, and they refunded me as soon as I contacted them, and then sent me a lovely email. I’ve been wearing their clothes ever since a friend introduced me to them. Excellent quality and lovely designs! Totally taken over my wardrobe (s)..🤣

Title: Terrible Returns
Text: The ordering wasn’t a problem, when the item came I didn’t like it as it was poor quality for the price and let me just say the returns process is abysmal. Never have I gone through the returns process and have had to go to a carriers website to generate the returns label myself and on top of that it costing more than a regular return from anywhere else. They should just get rid of their website all together and stick to selling on she in or sports direct. CRAP!

Title: Awful return process
Text: Awful return process. Avoid! You have to pay for and sort out your own return. There are no return labels. And they take almost a month to give you your money back! Avoid!!!

Title: Customer service was very good and…
Text: Customer service was very good and helpful.

Title: Terrible customer service, premium price
Text: Placed an order and after more than a week it wasn't dispatched. Emailed to ask for an update and was told it was out of stock and "sorry about that". Another week later and still no refund so I'm having to chase them up again.

Title: Always excellent quality clothes that…
Text: Always excellent quality clothes that last and keep their colour. Eco-friendly packaging, great eco credentials too. Staff always friendly and responsive to online contact and staff in store incredibly helpful too.

Title: Customer services listened
Text: Customer services listened to my concerns and, despite having worn the jacket a few times, accepted that there was a fault with the zip so effectively refunded me and enabled me to pay the difference to purchase a new more expensive waterproof jacket.  My only concern is that I hope they identify the fault when reselling it through Reskinned, for which I also received a discount. :-)

Title: Quick response to my query
Text: Quick response to my query, thank you

Title: No complaints so far
Text: First time ordering from missguided and received the items today.  I wasn't aware it was from China as the date I needed the items for have sadly passed, however I love everything ive received. Great quality and fit, im reading so many bad reviews but I honest cant complain (so far). I've gave 4 stars opposed to 5 as I do need to return 3 items that are simply too big, hoping that goes smoothly, I paid using klarna so the payment will just get blocked if there are any issues! Im holding out in hope all is OK though but based on experience so far I would definitely order again

Title: AVOID YOU WILL NOT GET YOUR REFUND
Text: Received an item that took weeks to arrive, sizing way off, wouldn't fit a doll! Accepted my return and I even have an email from them acknowledging receipt of the item and confirming my refund has been issued. We are now 3 weeks of emails back and forward and I STILL HAVE NO REFUND! Paypal strangely closed the claim in their favour as they confirmed they had refunded me, even although PayPal can clearly see they have not. This company have basically STOLEN from me and as they are based in China, its a waste of time continuing to email. I have lodged a chargeback on my card. DO NOT BUY FROM MISGUIDED AVOID AVOID AVOID

Title: AVOID THIS COMPANY!!
Text: AVOID THIS COMPANY!!! I returned 5 items to the value of £134 in Nov 4th, in the given time scale. I have proof they received the items at the address they told me to send them to.
