The address was in Walsall and I was travelling back home via Walsall around the same time, I decided to hand deliver the return to them. The warehouse is on an industrial estate that is  mainly for Shein. It’s full of Chinese and Asian workers who couldn’t speak very good English. When I was eventually able to speak to someone I was told they only accept items through the post which meant I had to pay £20 to return the items via Royal Mail. Which I did. I paid for items using the Klarna app. And after a month I still haven’t received a refund. I will be contacting Klarna to tell them Missguided are in breach of consumer rights as they should issue a refund within 14 days of receiving a return and they should not be offering a financial partnership with them any longer!!

Title: I love Lucy and Yak—I enjoy the fun and…
Text: I love Lucy and Yak—I enjoy the fun and quirky prints.  Their customer service is unparalleled —I will be a customer for life.

Title: Finisterre’s customer service is…
Text: Finisterre’s customer service is excellent, quickly resolved and well handled!

Title: Disgusting
Text: Would be a Zero if there was an option !!!! Their return policy gives you 3 options to return … Ups .. DHL … & Evri … they give a name & address to return to , at your own cost !! Evri need a QR code .. UPS & DHL need an e. Mail address & tel no for the receiver…  at Miss Guided !!! They will not give me this !!! as it’s a unit no !!!!! This is not the Miss Guided that was .. it’s gotta be someone selling off bits of Miss Guided stock .. I have asked to return by Royal Mail , who doesn’t need the receivers name or e. Mail address but it is not an option … Most peeps would give up & just keep it , however I’m not !!!!!!

Title: Great customer service
Text: Great customer service. Contacted finisterre about an item out of stock online, and they quickly found a store that had it in stock and gave me the contact details to be able to contact them. Christmas present sorted!

Title: Having not received the 10% when I…
Text: Having not received the 10% when I ordered from my newly downloaded app … very quickly they helped by sending me a 10% refund … lovely, efficient customer service !!

Title: Excellent customer service from Douglas…
Text: Excellent customer service from Douglas over the phone. My husband’s xmas present is now sorted. Thanks so much, Merry Christmas 🎅🏻

Title: Nice online shop with many sizes
Text: Nice online shop with many sizes, excellent customer support, helped me out a lot. 10/10

Title: Customer service is awful
Text: Customer service is awful. Ive ordered a click and collect which was due to collect yesterday, however I had the dispatched to the plymouth store email but nothing to say its ready to collect. Ive emailed.. nothing, online chat...doesnt connect to a human, plymouth store... doesnt answer the phone. Ive recently had surgery and dont want to go all the way into the city centre for it not to be ready but also dont want to miss my window for collection considering the amount of reviews that have had problems with no collection notification until they've decided to send it back. GB4238059585

Title: Incredible customer service
Text: Incredible customer service, thank you Becky. Items are always excellent quality, arrive well packaged and thoughtfully designed. Thanks again!

Title: They do their best to rectify mistakes
Text: I like their clothes and I admire that they fund and support marine conservation. They also support the RNLI which everyone knows is a brilliant charity

Title: terrible company
Text: terrible company, no customer service response what so ever, no contact number which answers, trying to return an item is awful, they don’t even give qr codes to send off when filling out the return label! SCAM AND AVOID

Title: A satisfactory resolution to a customer service problem.
Text: I called the  customer relations line re  a problem ordering  an item on their website,  and wrote  a review   detailing what I considered to be  an incomplete response  to their  website /ordering problem. Subsequent to   the review , Finisterre  have   proposed a workaround   for me to obtain the item, and offered  me a 20%  discount. I am   pleased to say that this  is  for me, a satisfactory  resolution to  the issue .

Title: We bought daughter a top for birthday…
Text: We bought daughter a top for birthday but it was a size too small. Unfortunately we could not find receipt but had payment on banking app. Labels still on jumper but Bournemouth Primark store refused to change for next size up jumper. Poor daughter upset as had really wanted top for her birthday.

Title: This was my first order with Finisterre…
Text: This was my first order with Finisterre and I had a small problem with a code . I emailed them on a Sunday and this was corrected by 10am the next day . Excellent customer service I think . Thanks

Title: Another brilliant customer service…
Text: Another brilliant customer service review for Finisterre. I recently received an order - Firecrest Gilet - which was sent with the security tag still attached. When I contacted them they immediately sent a replacement item which I received within a couple of days along with a free return label. And I also contacted them about an item which was out of stock online and they sent me the phone number of a store which had one available which I was able to purchase over the phone. Brilliant customer service!

Title: Avoid avoid avoid
Text: Like so many other reviews, I had no idea MISSGUIDED was now owned by Shein. No indication that everything is shipped from China, and the est delivery window is absolute nonsense. Items arrived late, poor quality, awful customer service and I since found the exact same item from MISSGUIDED themselves on Shein at half the price!!

Title: Great Service - Bath Branch
Text: My wife and I went into the Bath Branch to look for a rain jacket each. An exceptionally kind assistant by the name of Arabella came over to us and actually listened to what we thought we wanted. She then took us through the various items of clothing that they stocked. She answered technical questions and where she didn't know the answer she was not embarrassed to go and ask her colleagues for the information. Arabella made the shopping experience a thoroughly pleasant one. The other huge bonus is the 5 year warranty that is offered with the clothing we ended up buying. The initial cost looked expensive,  but when you factor in the warranty period compared to other outdoor pursuit shops, it makes total sense. I bought a £300  rain jacket from another mountain outdoor company and within 14 months it had started leaking and was of course out of the warranty period -  very disappointing. Finistere will be our first port of call when we are looking for more outdoor clothing.

Title: Very professional
Text: Very professional, super quick. Exceptional customer service.

Title: Horrendous experience
Text: Horrendous experience Spent about £100 on an order and had to return all items except one due to poor sizing/quality! Have been chasing this up and they keep referring to a refund from a previous order in August, even after I sent evidence of the item being signed their end on collection over 2 weeks ago! All of the information I provided clearly states this order was made on October and returned within the timescales! This is very upsetting and frustrating especially when I have photographic proof they have received the parcel which I also had to incur the costs of returning!!! I feel like I am speaking another language! I have been emailing back and forth for a week now this is terrible!!

Title: Milan was a superstar in helping me…
Text: Milan was a superstar in helping me resolve an item exchange after I had an issue with a specific item’s material quality that strangely shrunk in the wash. They were very responsive and resolved my query quickly and easily. Thanks Milan for making me feel heard. Picking up my replacement jumper this weekend which I believe will maintain the usual exceptional quality from Finisterre. Happy customer!

Title: Worst customers services & returns…
Text: Worst customers services & returns procedure ever. Will never order from them again. Better service with Temu!

Title: Love their Yulex
Text: Their Yulex swim gear is superb I regularly swim in the frigid waters of the Hebrides all year round and their suits are easy on, comfortable and help keep the cold out Love that they change the colours  regularly

Title: Received a dress that was too small
Text: Received a dress that was too small, after email upon emails and being asked to measure the dress... What is that all about. Have no idea how to return as no instructions. I went through the customer service.. absolutely impossible to send this back. Been trying a few weeks to do this. Never again would I buy from this company. Stay well clear

Title: My query was answered promptly and in…
Text: My query was answered promptly and in depth. Problem was solved. Thank you.

Title: Brilliant Customer Service
Text: I have been a long time customer of Finisterre and was intending to buy one of their jackets.  However, I had left it too late and by the time I got around to ordering, it was no longer available on the website. As a last resort, I emailed Finisterre Customer Services.  They could not have been more helpful.  They searched across their branch network and found the jacket in the right colour and size in their store in Bristol. When I 'phoned the store in Bristol, they were brilliant - really helpful and my jacket is now on its way. I have always appreciated the quality and ethos at Finisterre, and this is backed up by some fantastic employees and truly excellent customer service.

Title: 1st Class Service …
Text: I recently ordered one of their Barent jumpers which had such positive reviews. The jumper is a great quality, however what was even better was their customer care. I had an issue with the order which the resolved so quickly, without fuss, and with ease. If only online shopping was always as good as this.

Title: Great customer service
Text: I received a discount code for my first order, this didn’t work so I emailed via the contact us link. Email was replied to in 20 minutes with a new code. Great customer service. Thank you.

Title: My elderly father had an issue with the…
Text: My elderly father had an issue with the zip mechanism of his jacket. It was great to be able to speak to a real person, who quickly understood the nature of my query and helped to find a solution. Turns out it was user error! Thank you

Title: Royal mail lost my parcel by putting it…
Text: Royal mail lost my parcel by putting it in my bin which got cleared away! Lucy and yak replaced the item with no fuss, really good to deal with.

Title: Phenomenal Company producing high quality products
Text: Similar to patagonia - high quality products built with longevity in mind. Even when the clothes do break down and are damaged, finisterre will attempt repair before replacing them. The price tag is high but worth it. I've purchased a few items and I'm very pleased with them. Finisterre will be one of the companies I regularly shop at. Returns are simple, quick and free. Which is a huge bonus given that so many retailers are now charging for returns. My only complaint is the sizing is really hit and miss for me. Trousers have a generous cut (a bit too generous in my opinion) and my sizing seems to be between a Large and XL. Not much of an issue though given their returns process.

Title: Excellent customer service
Text: In my experience Lucy and Yak are an excellent company selling high quality clothes with very responsive customer service, so I was surprised to see that they are getting some negative reviews. Reading the recent ones though, most of them seem to be related to a scam website posting to be Lucy and Yak - avoid by going directly for their website rather than clicking links and check carefully before buying.

Title: Natalie was great
Text: Natalie was great, the issue was resolved in one email.

Title: Very quick to help me
Text: Very quick to help me. Thanks

Title: I am trying to return some items back…
Text: I am trying to return some items back to Missguided UK, and they have made this difficult to implement. I was online , within the return window of a week and a few days. There is a ridiculous contact form that will not allow me to enter my order number manually. This is prevented by a drop-down option that displays my order, but it will not let me select the order to complete the return process. I do not want to be stuck with this order or now end up passing the return date because of their rigged system - what should I do ?

Title: Excellent customer service!
Text: I didn’t end up purchasing anything, but I had an excellent experience with customer service! I bought a jacket which was too big, I exchanged it for a smaller size but since it was still too big I ultimately asked for a refund. The customer service agent, Hannah, who I contacted via email, was super helpful! Everything from ordering to the return process to the refund, was super smooth!

Title: Amazing customer service
Text: You dont normally see people talk about customer service unless its a negative and I feel when companies do it right it should be talked about just as much. I'd placed an order and a few days later a new promo had launched, I contacted the email and quoted my order reference and they'd refunded me back the discount all within hours which is outstanding on something they didn't need to honour. Will certainly be back

Title: On the 21st of October I returned two…
Text: On the 21st of October I returned two dresses as they were not suitable. I requested a refund I have also sent email upon email to be constantly fobbed off being advised they are looking into this. I have emailed proof of return postage. Still no refund issued avoid this company at all costa I am now taking this further

Title: If I could give this company zero…
Text: If I could give this company zero stars, I would! Missguided, represents the old stereotypical views of buying from China. Cheap rubbish with even worse customer service! I ordered from this rubbish company, and returned their cheap clothes. I had to pay £13.99 for tracked return. They received the goods in September! It's now November and I am still awaiting a refund! They lie every time you email to ask for an update. At this point they have just stolen my money. In the UK all the trading standards and governing bodies are beyond useless! So you don't get your money back, and theiving companies like Missguided continue to rob innocent customers with impunity Save your money don't buy from this terrible cheap company!

Title: Terrific customer service
Text: Terrific customer service.  Beginning with supporting me through the return of a gift and then the team were able to source a product out of stock on line and put me in contact with the store.  I feel they went over and about what I could expect.

Title: Fantastic customer service as well as products
Text: Fantastic customer service help sending another jacket to compare sizes in the Nimbus range.  Such a helpful and friendly assistant - new jacket sent and arrived the next day.  Perfect!  5* all round.  Thank you.

Title: Excellent delivery, great communication
Text: Ordered a jacket but the size was too small. Emailed my local store to ask whether I could come in a swap it for the larger size, but they didn’t have it in stock. So just initiated the return online and ordered the larger size. Even with the standard delivery of 3-5 working days, it’s very quick. Responses to my emails were quick too. Return delivery was easy - just showed a QR code at the Post Office and they printed the labelled and took it off my hands. Only thing I’d request is that if a discount code was applied to an item being returned, the discount is code is offered again once the returned item has been received - got around it by signing up for newsletters using an account I hadn’t signed up with previously…

Title: DISGRACEFUL AND DISGUSTING!!
Text: DISGRACEFUL AND DISGUSTING!! I placed my order and literally one minute later, not a second more, I messaged them to cancel it. The next day they emailed me asking “why do you want to cancel” I HAVE NEVER SEEN THIS IN MY LIFE! Why would they ask why, as a consumer you have the right to cancel especially when it’s a minute after placing order, it was not dispatched, nothing! When i replied to that email i said I am not obligated to tell you as long as I’m within my rights! The next day they shipped it out and emailed me saying “oh sorry it was already dispatched” Can you believe how disgusting they are?? Word of advice, never buy from them! They’re 100% trained scammers!

Title: Cheap, tacky rubbish
Text: They are essentially just dropshipping cheap, tacky garbage from China for a 400% markup, ordered 2 items and they didn't appear to be the right shape for a human being in the slightest The returns process is very awkward, no prepaid labels and simple drop-offs like most other companies, instead they gave you an address and you have to sort it all out by yourself. Awful, awful, awful - avoid!

Title: Hannah
Text: Hannah, dealt with my delicate matter with compassion and sorted out the mess I made.  Very grateful for everything she did.

Title: fantastic customer services
Text: I’ve had to contact Finisterre customer services a couple of times over the years for minor issues, and every time they’ve been quick to reply and incredibly pragmatic with their solutions. If only every company was this easy to deal with, only adds to the positives of buying from them! (Obviously the clothes are excellent and have been lasting me for years as well)

Title: Top notch customer service
Text: Top notch customer service - fast response - and lovely helpful staff

Title: New Misguided from Shien - SCAMMERS
Text: I bought a dress that doesn’t fit, when registering my refund they gave me £15.56 when the item cost me £18.75. I have emailed them asking why and their response has nothing to do with my question. The return process is not easy- no QR code, have to pay for delivery and upload evidence and tracking info. Reading these reviews doesn’t look like I’m going to get my money back!! DO NOT BUY COMPLETE SCAM!!!!

Title: Good as new!
Text: I sent off my 6yr old Nebulas jacket for a repair to the side seam next to the pocket. I had already had a stab at repairing it myself, with very poor results. My jacket was retuned sooner than I expected and the repair is wonderful. You wouldn't know it had been patched. It looks good as new and I look forward to many more years of wear. I can't recommend the repair service highly enough. Thank you so much.

Title: Recommended
Text: ... fair und fancy products. Friendly and fast customer service. Ordered from Germany

Title: Ordered 2 items they are way too big
Text: Ordered 2 items they are way too big. I sent a request to return them And they want me to send photos of the wash tag with a tape measure showing how big it is! Absolutely ridiculous I just want to return something. No company has ever asked me for this just to return an item! It’s took 10 days to get to me and the tracking information wasn’t even available! Don’t order from here it’s a shambles

Title: Toasty sweaters!
Text: Great, fast customer service. Would definitely purchase another Mora sweater. Held up and kept me warm and dry in tough Scottish Highlands weather!

Title: Fantastic customer support
Text: Incredibly helpful support with really quick results. The team works hard to rectify any issues as fast as they can.

Title: Don’t bother
Text: Didn’t realise they’d been bought by shein but have actually had better service from shein! Item is far too big and not as described. Had to request a return as that info isn’t freely available. Asked me to send pictures alongside a tape measure? The dress is too big FOR ME! Advised they have to allow a return under consumer rights act but heard nothing back.

Title: Superb customer care
Text: Bought a fleece which I thought was fine so removed the tags, however when I tried it with different clothing realised it was too big. I contacted customer service to see what I could do and they were super helpful and really quick at responding. Really impressed by their customer care.

Title: Super helpful with everything!
Text: Super helpful with everything!

Title: Terrible customer service
Text: I was unaware the company had been taken over by Shein. The product quality has dropped and Im finding it extremely difficult to return a couple of my items. I have been asked to take pictures of the labels with a measuring tape...... absolutely ludicrous. Never experienced such a polava to return items. Even the Shein website is easier to return Shein items! If I knew I had to go through such a headache to rrturn items I would have never ordered them. I was a Misguided customer but will not be ordering from them again.

Title: Very happy
Text: Wonderful fast efficient friendly response when I had trouble using discount code, made everything go smoothly. Totally positive experience, thank you Finisterre

Title: Stole my money
Text: Accepted my returns but didn't refund my money. Do not buy. Avoid

Title: Can you review any lower than 1!!!
Text: Can you review any lower than 1!!!! i bought a spider-man hat for my son in cork!! tried to exchange it in the Corrib Centre in Galway today !!! wow to say the staff were awful was an understatement!! too bothered with a charity cycle to help ANYONE!!! two staff hiding behind rails laughing and joking about antibiotics !! The manager would not swap a child's hat for me !! Loads in stock !! loads and i was past 1 day to return it! i spent 200 Euros in pennys !! but the manager today was so rude and so awful !! Came home with 2 hats    !! Worst Pennys ever !! avoid !! Dear Primark your target market is now teens !! Do you realise parents fund the teens !!!! avoid this store

Title: Excellent customer service
Text: Speedy replies to emails Extremely helpful staff who go above and beyond Highly recommend

Title: Top Class Customer Service!
Text: Finisterre replaced with no question a 2yr old faulty  jacket, the response was swift and resolved within 48 hrs. THAT is how you do good customer service. Thank you Finisterre - I will be returning, and recommending!

Title: Disgusting!
Text: Firstly, the website barley works and I wasn’t aware they had been taken over by Shein, none of the products matched the description/images, were all awful and horrid material and the refund process is a joke! It is disgusting I have to pay out of my own pocket to send clothes back made from underpaid staff! Never buy from here.

Title: I can’t rate Lucy & Yak highly enough
Text: I can’t rate Lucy & Yak highly enough. I’ve been shopping with them for years, their clothes are unique, really colourful and comfortable, also sustainable. Their customer service is outstanding, Ella and the team recently went above and beyond to sort out an issue with an order which was actually my fault as I had put in the wrong email address. They  were so lovely and helpful, sorted it out promptly. 😊

Title: Love all my L&Y clothes
Text: Love all my L&Y clothes. I bought a jacket for my wife for her birthday which sadly went missing at the fault of royal mail and they kindly refunded me and gave me a discount to buy another jacket. Thank you so much. X

Title: Clothes are badly made
Text: These clothes are not true to the website pictures, bad quality and fitting, they won't even give free returns. Never will I buy from them again.

Title: No refunds available even though it is expensive to send back
Text: Terrible service. You cannot get a refund and have to send clothes back to an address in Poland. No use as you pay a lot and they never return any of your emails. Quality fo clothes also low.

Title: Excellent customer service and beautiful, colourful clothes
Text: There was a glitch with my delivery address and my parcel was returned to L&Y. After I contacted customer service Ella sorted it all out very quickly and I've received my order the next day. The service I received was well above and beyond. A very nice company to deal with in addition to the lovely clothes they sell.

Title: I returned items worth £87.50 and have…
Text: I returned items worth £87.50 and have not had a refund. Can’t get my money back through PayPal and am being ignored by customer services.

Title: Awesome clothes, awesome people
Text: Deeply grateful for the fast and impeccable help from Lisa and the Lucy and Yak team! Their clothes and accessories are awesome and so are they!

Title: Great customer service
Text: I ordered another pair of Lucy and yak dungarees, my third pair as I love them so much. Unfortunately they were a bit big, so I decided to return them to my local shop in Bristol. Lily who served me was a absolute little star, really helpful and friendly, I would like to say a very big thank you to her I did land up with an exchange which are a good fit and also brought myself another pair 🤭

Title: I cannot fault this company for…
Text: I cannot fault this company for excellent customer service. Every time I enter one of their stores, I am greeted by a friendly staff. Unfortunately, my jeans ripped after less than 1 year of owning them. I contacted the team to ask for guidance - I know patching up Yaks is the next best step. They kindly gave me a voucher to purchase new jeans and suggested I either patch up my existing jeans, or return them to the shop to be Re-Yaked!

Title: If I could give 0 stars I would
Text: If I could give 0 stars I would.  This company are the worst company I have ever dealt with.  The item I received was faulty, I reported this, they asked for photos of the fault that I sent them, they then asked for phots of the label, that I sent them.  They then asked for photos of the full item, that I sent them.  I kept asking them for a label to send back but even though the item is faulty I have to pay for the label.  I will never deal with this company again.

Title: Very Cozy
Text: I bought a dark green men’s Barent sweater for my husband but liked it so much I kept it for myself and bought another one for him. I’ve worn it a lot. So comfortable and warm. Although the XL is very large for my small size frame it looks great.

Title: Brilliant, human, support from Becky!
Text: The customer support team, Becky in particular, was an unbelievable help. Becky went out of her way to resolve my issue and reassure me, I was so grateful. In a world where customer service is usually so impersonal and automated, Becky was proactive, human and a breath of fresh air. Thank you so much - a real credit to you!

Title: Brilliant Customer After Care
Text: My fisherman’s beanie shrunk in the wash despite following the care instructions. I reached out to Finisterre who promptly issued me with a replacement hat after obtaining the relevant details/ proof of purchase etc. Excellent customer after-care. Also, the warmest hat I’ve ever owned!

Title: Sophie in customer services is so helpful
Text: Amazing customer service from Sophie. I buy from Finisterre regularly and really like the clothes. However, it's the customer service that really shines through. Absolutely fantastic, helpful service.

Title: Always had a great experience and the…
Text: Always had a great experience and the clothes last ages.

Title: If I could give zero stars I would.
Text: If I could give zero stars I would. I've been battling since August for a refund. I didnt know misguided was took over by shein, id never have ordered otherwise as their clothes are terrible. They lied and lied saying they'd tried refunding but my bank wouldn't accept until I said I was involving the ombudsman. Low and behold got my refund but for less than I paid. Joke of a company that i will never shop from again.  Their attitudes are as crap as their clothes

Title: Their returns process is terrible
Text: Their returns process is terrible. I put in my details to return but no returns note or address was sent to my email. Avoid shopping online with this company.

Title: Lucy and Yak is one of my favorite…
Text: Lucy and Yak is one of my favorite brands! Their clothes aren’t just fun and good quality, but the team is consistently kind and accommodating! No hesitations purchasing from such a well-rounded brand, and they always keep me coming back!

Title: Had a faulty item
Text: Had a faulty item, the team resolved it and gave me several options on how I wanted to proceed with it. Honestly the best customer service and support I could have received!!!

Title: It is such a change to deal with a…
Text: It is such a change to deal with a company with such good, friendly ,communication, who stick to their promises snd resolve problems quickly. A fantastic company all round!

Title: Great Service, Design and Company Ethos
Text: Sophie was very understanding of the issue I had with the Rainbird jacket and undertook to replace it with the newer design without further question. The replacement was sent the moment my returned jacket arrived at Finisterre and I haven’t looked back. The new jacket is a very good design, fit and most importantly - is weathertight! I have been very impressed and grateful for such a great service and company ethos. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Finisterre to anyone.

Title: Avoid at all costs
Text: Avoid at all costs - they are not providing me with an returns note or dress to return items for a refund

Title: very cheap but suitable clothes for all…
Text: very cheap but suitable clothes for all stuff the environment wasn’t the best tho

Title: Really hard to contact and then expect…
Text: Really hard to contact and then expect you to pay for return. Won't be shopping with them anymore

Title: Please avoid!!!
Text: Please avoid!!!! Terrible customer service service! terrible communication Terrible costly returns process Still waiting for £ to be refunded after a long period of time SHEIN clothes. Not the usual misguided Never using them again

Title: Sophie at Finisterre was a ray of…
Text: Sophie at Finisterre was a ray of sunshine when facing the stormy rough seas of customer service I have faced in the past. From my first email I was met with kindness and understanding and the fastest reply I’ve ever helped. Her service was clearly communicated and really kind respectful and helpful. Resolving the whole matter incredibly fast. I had been so disappointed with the quality of the item I had purchased but she turned the whole experience into a really positive one.

Title: This isn’t like the old misguided - It’s SHEIN
Text: This isn’t like the old misguided. Which was similar to PLT etc. This is SHEIN clothing. Low quality. Nothing fit well, and the returns process is insane. I had to send images of all the clothes I needed to return. (They were made with such low quality). The returns process was accepted. They give you a return address and YOU have to organise and return it yourself!! My return was delivered the day after and I do not have my refund. They have said ‘once the warehouse receives it’ they will confirm if it’s eligible for a refund!? It has been delivered and I’ve already had acceptance of the refund.  Please don’t bother to order from MISSGUIDED. It’s NOT like the original, and don’t forget it’s all from SHEIN.

Title: Ordered 4 items which took weeks to…
Text: Ordered 4 items which took weeks to arrive. Which I now realise is because items now come from Shein/China after doing some research. Quality is terrible, cheap and one of the dresses I had ordered came stitched the wrong way. When I finally got hold of someone I was told to make my own returns label that cost me £7.60! Also was told to return to a random warehouse. Awful. Avoid.

Title: They don’t allow you to return!
Text: In the returns policy they say drop them an email to return but they do not respond. I tried social media too and they ignored it all! You should have the right to return something you’ve bought online

Title: Excellent service over three visits
Text: Excellent service over three visits! Helpful considerate staff, knowledgeable, unhurried, unpushy, professional expertise matched by nice personal touch about what to wear in wind and rain in the Outer Hebrides now the autumn storms are arriving! Am ready now with my Stormbird weatherproof as Storm Amy approaches. Thank you Finisterre Bath.

Title: Have to spend £100 for free shipping
Text: Have to spend £100 for free shipping. Shipping isn’t the fastest. Discount codes which seem to initially work will not complete. The clothes are good but the brand premium is a little too high.

Title: Amazing
Text: Amazing! Emily was super helpful and prompt with help on my need to action a return, thanks Emily!

Title: Nearly £7 to return 2 items and they…
Text: Nearly £7 to return 2 items and they can't even give you a label so had to find a printer as I was sent the address by email!!!  absolute joke, contact options are shocking, returns portal doesnt recognise your order. No issues accepting the sale though. Will never order from them again they need to stay in liquidation absolute s*** show

Title: Amazing customer service
Text: Bought a waterproof coat three years ago and recently the membrane had started to flake out of the hood. I contacted customer support just to make them aware of the issue, to hopefully help them making new waterproofs going forward. Instead they immediately replaced my jacket with a new one. Fantastic customer service! In addition, all their other products I have bought are top quality.

Title: Men's Nieuwland 2mm Yulex® Long Sleeve…
Text: Men's Nieuwland 2mm Yulex® Long Sleeve Top. Bought for cold water swimming - utterly superb. I use it in Hampstead ponds every day. At the moment we are about 13 or 14 degrees and the top makes all the difference. Couple of laps and you don't even feel the cold. Bare legs of course are trembling. Compared this to decathlon's tops, but the Yulex wins in quality - note especially the neck (decathlon's chafe) thickness 2mm I think will be fine all winter. Real quality and money well spent. I went to the Finisterre shop in Neals Street - amazing customer service very knowledgable. I'm 6 foot and took a large, because the tops ride up slightly as you swim, but not enough to allow water in.

Title: Cheap, tacky, clothing
Text: I use to love misguided and then a new owner took over it. Off course had to be the same one as shein. Misguided has gone right down hill. Crap and cheap material like shein. Wrong sizes and smaller than original sizes would have been or make you look extra swamped instead - since the new owner took over misguided needs to just give in. You’re cheap, tacky and distorted. I use to love shopping with misguided and now I’ll never buy from the brand again. Oh and also if you buy from shein you get free returns but if you buy from the site you have to pay to send items back and before a return you have to contact them specifically for them to give you an address. The company is whack and unprofessional and I’m surprised it’s still in business considering the amount of reviews to their brand. Not worth the money anymore. Just cheap, tacky, fast fashion. I wish the previous owner hadn’t of gone bust they was great for their customers. Trust me don’t buy from here it’s not worth it.

Title: I wouldn’t even give this 1 star…
Text: I wouldn’t even give this 1 star their customer service is shocking! My items were sent back on the 12th July and i still have not been refunded. Numerous emails and proof of return sent multiple times but no one ever gets back to you it’s just basically a generic email that says they will be in touch. I will never use this site again and will now go through my bank to hopefully claw the money back that they owe me.

Title: Absolutely love Lucy and Yak dungarees.
Text: Absolutely love Lucy and Yak dungarees. So comfy to wear and I always get compliments.

Title: Great Support
Text: The support agents were quick to respond, extremely courteous and very helpful.

Title: Friendly and great customer service.
Text: Friendly and great customer service.

Title: Great customer support
Text: Fantastic customer service - I had a problem with one of my purchases and was really impressed by the response, options offered and efficiency of service.

Title: Brilliant
Text: I received quick, helpful service from the Finisterre team and am really happy with the jacket I bought. Brilliant – thank you!

Title: London
Text: I bought my dungarees at the sale in London this year. I went with my daughter who is a total convert. Now, at the age of 72, I  have had breast cancer for the second time in 22 years. Post mastectomy and reconstruction, as I am healing, I  have found the  dungarees to be a blessing. They are both comfortable and easy to remove and put on. Go Lucy and Yak. I have a soap box...... Over 70s don't  neglect mamagrams! One third of people who get diagnosed with breast cancer are over 70. Nag friends and relatives. Being a woman is not easy, but we are not HELPLESS. Madelaine

Title: I have shopped with Lucy and yak for a…
Text: I have shopped with Lucy and yak for a couple of years or so now. In store and online. Always had a great experience. Most recently I had an issue with a pair of jeans that have developed a tear after a few wears. I emailed customer service with an image and the whole situation was dealt within a couple of emails. Fantastic customer service and care as always 🫶

Title: Just amazing customer service!
Text: When a recent delivery was stolen outside my house, Finisterre immediately sent me another item. I've been a huge fan of Finisterre for years, but now I'm even more impressed by them as a company. Just fantastic customer service!

Title: Do not use this company!
Text: Missguided is now Shein.  The clothes are really bad quality, mis-sized, take so long to arrive and returns are shocking!  I sent my items back 2 weeks ago, followed up today regarding my refund and they asked from proof of return. I've sent it and now have to wait on them confirming they've received it. Which they did, 2 days after I sent it, as I've checked the proof of delivery! Avoid!

Title: Horrendous!!!
Text: Horrendous since it’s been taken over by SHEIN. Terrible quality items. You have to pay tracking to return and they still haven’t given me my refund which was promised a few months ago. I have now taken this up with my bank to get my money back. Absolute scam!

Title: Terrible experience
Text: Terrible experience. The item I bought was a play suit which was actually from SHEIN and not miss guided which wasn’t clear when I purchased. It arrived faulty, sent back at my own cost and they wouldn’t refunded the original delivery cost even though the 2015 consumer rights say that you should not pay delivery costs for faulty item. Still waiting for a refund even after many many emails. Will never purchase poor quality items online from here again

Title: No refund!!!!
Text: As people have said items are now from SHEIN so you’re paying extra through misguided when you can find the same items on the SHEIN website! I had to pay for the return and used Evri so I had tracking evidence that the item had been delivered to the return address but I’ve never received my refund of £34. I paid through PayPal but they closed my dispute and didn’t do anything! DO NOT order from this site

Title: I ordered from misguided 3 dresses the…
Text: I ordered from misguided 3 dresses the quality is mediocre and a tad too tight so I wanted to return the items. No options for returning goods as other customers have experienced. As items are only a tad too tight I will hopefully slim into them and plan on losing weight anyway. After reading other reviews I'd prefer to keep the items and not risk being ripped off further by covering the cost of the return and never getting any refund Lesson learned Misguided are a con company I've literally had much better service from Shein and Temu who actually provide efficient refund system. I feel very Misguided and they deserve No rating at all! Be aware and stay away from purchasing from  this dreadful company.

Title: Mr gill
Text: I had the most amazing experience, the security guard in Kingston primark. He helped me with my bags whilst I shopped, he showed me where everything was. Super friendly and welcoming, and helped me out so much bless his soul kindest person iv ever met. He deserves a pay rise. Mr Gill best security guard in Kingston iv ever met

Title: Didn’t want to give 1 star
Text: Didn’t want to give 1 star! Absolutely shocking service! I’ve been trying to contact them for months to send returns back but it’s impossible!! Do not shop at Missguided!

Title: Scam company
Text: Not delivered. Tracking link doesn't work. Scam company. I'm 25 quid out of pocket and no customer service to answer to

Title: Bad experience
Text: I bought from Missguided for the first time recently. Ordered a cream jacket I had seen all over social media. Ordered a size 10 as 8 and 6 were out of stock. It arrived and it was awful.....way too thin to be advertised as a jacket,poor quality and too big for me. I returned the jacket asap...no pre-paid label and cost me £3.60 to return. Unfortunately I had also ordered the same jacket in a 6 and 8 BEFORE I received the size 10. So when 6 and 8 arrived I didnt even open I just returned asap at a cost to me of £4.20. I am now £ 7.80 out of pocket but hey ho! I didnt received my refunds so had to chase this up my end by showing proof of returns. Finally got both my refunds today....full amount for size 6 and 8 jackets but the size 10 jacket was £3 less what I paid. When I queried this I was told it was non refundable shipping costs!!!!! So I am over £10 out of pocket! Communication was very poor. I will definately NOT be buying from Missguided again. So please beware....only buy if you are 100% you are going to like the item and you are 100% its going to fit you...otherwise be prepared to lose money!

Title: DO NOT USE!!
Text: DO NOT USE!!! Ordered a dress from them 2 weeks ago, told me 5-8 days. Never got any parcel and still haven’t. Tried to send an email and it’s not letting the email go through to them. Tried to ring the phone number google is giving and it doesn’t work! Took my money and got NOTHING. AVOID AT ALL COSTS!!!!!!

Title: Great customer service
Text: Had an issue with a t-shirt.  Exchanged it for another item, the process was super easy and the communication was great.

Title: Great
Text: Fast, polite and useful response

Title: Overall happy!
Text: I had to write a review after seeing all the terrible ones on here! I had ordered from Missguided before and ordered this time without looking at reviews or knowing that they had been taken over by shein. The order took about about 10 days to arrive. I bought dress options for a wedding. The quality was good for the price I paid. I needed to return 3 out of the 4 dresses. This is when I realised that it was no longer as straightforward to return. Having then seen all these reviews my heart sank and pretty much thought I could kiss goodbye to the £80. You have to register a return first by contacting customer services. My first email was unanswered but they came back quickly to my second email. They ask what you want to return and then give you an address to send it to. You have to pay to return the items, for 3 fairly heavy dresses it was £4.75 via Royal Mail tracked. You then have to email them with the tracking number. They responded to these emails within 24 hours and a refund was processed very quickly (within a couple of days). So overall I have to say even though it’s a bit more of a faff, I am happy with everything.  Maybe I was one of the lucky ones but I thought it was only fair I share my positive experience!

Title: Prompt response to my customer services…
Text: Prompt response to my customer services email re discount code. Friendly ,polite email reply’s ,solution focused and positively resolved  quickly . Really pleased with my women's waterproof jacket which arrived quickly too. Would recommend Finisterre.

Title: Waste of time and money!!
Text: Waste of time and money!!! Returned an item over 2 weeks ago and still no refund. They keep telling me to wait 10-14 days

Title: Avoid!!
Text: Ordered some trousers, quality is poor given the cost, feels similar to SHEIN quality at inflated costs. Took an age to arrive, I queried customer services and my order number didn’t exist in their system. When I tried to generate a return, same problem. System didn’t recognise my order, after contacting them again after being initially ignored, returns are at my own cost. I wouldn’t go back. Avoid like the plague!

Title: DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY
Text: DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY. I purchased a dressing gown from Missguided which arrived defective. When I contacted customer service, they refused to provide a refund despite the item being faulty. This is completely unacceptable and not in line with consumer rights. I would strongly advise others not to shop with Missguided, as they do not take responsibility for selling defective products and fail to resolve genuine customer complaints.

Title: Dont believe every review you read!
Text: To be honest, I'm one of those who rarely leave a review if its good - but this time I will. I made an order of some outfits for my holiday because I kept seeing adverts on Facebook and loved the look of some of the items but was wary now its on Shein regarding sizing etc. After ordering I read the reviews on here which made me worry that my items would be crap sizing and material, which made me panic buy on other websites. My items came and can honestly say the sizing and material are totally fine. Infact I cant wait to get on holiday now and wear them! Dont believe everything you read, sometimes people only review if its bad! I shall be ordering again in the future :-)

Title: Absolute sh*t company
Text: Absolute sh*t company. Returned an order in July with proof of postage and they have still not issued a refund!! Do NOT waste your time or money with this company they are a shambles.

Title: The quality is shit
Text: The quality is shit, and customers service is awful. They tried to scam your money. I had to wait for over a month to get my refund back, they did not wanted to refund you until I keep sending them emails and spam it. I had to fight for it and Finally I get my refund after a month. DO NOT ORDER FROM THEM. THIS COMPANY IS SHIT. SCAM..!!!

Title: absolutely shocking after care
Text: absolutely shocking after care.  Taken money from my paypal and no evidence of my order on my account.  Tried to contact via contact us and wont let me as i the order number not on my account.  Sent messages and no response.  I have been chasing my money that you Miss guided has taken.

Title: This feels like a scam
Text: This feels like a scam. Made the mistake of ordering because I saw an ad on Instagram and the clothes looked nice. They took nearly 4 weeks to arrive from China and they were cheap and nasty. Paid to send them back, missguided don't provide any return label, you have to email them to get a return address and it gets sent back to some rogue address. After emailing them for a month and being ignored, I was advised they hadn't received the return (convenient) and I've had to pay full price for the cheap order that I don't have. Don't fall for it.

Title: Outstanding customer service
Text: I have been a customer of Finisterre for over 15 years and have always been happy with every aspect of their products and customer service.  Recently, and very unusually, I had cause to contact customer service to question the longevity of one of their products that I purchased some 4 years ago. The care and attention I received from every team member I dealt with was exemplarary and took all of the stress out of what might have been a difficult set of conversations. I was respectfully questioned about my purchase history and product care, communication between team members was flawless and then, very unexpectedly, I was offered a replacement garment which was sent to me in time for a holiday deadline. And I was introduced to the 'reskinned' service which helped ease my conscience. Thank you Finisterre - always happy to recommend.

Title: Thank you once again for such great service …
Text: Thank you once again for such great ethical clothing and customer service. It would be wonderful if other company’s adopted the same values as yourselves !

Title: BEWARE THE COMPANY WAS SOLD BY MIKE…
Text: BEWARE THE COMPANY WAS SOLD BY MIKE ASHLEY TO CHINESE COMPANY SHEIN. THE PRODUCTS ARE DISPATCHED FROM CHINA. THE SIZES ARE SMALL (NOT TRUE TO FIT) AND AS FOR RETURNS. GOOD LUCK! YOU HAVE TO RAISE A TICKET. WHEN THEY FINALLY GET BACK TO YOU, YOU HAVE TO SEND THE PARCEL TO SOME RANDOM UK ADDRESS AND PAY FOR THE RETURN YOURSELF. THEN YOU MUST SEND PROOF OF POSTAGE AND CHASE FOR REFUND AFTERWARDS. IF THATS NOT BAD ENOUGH, THEY WILL ALSO DEDUCT THE POSTAGE CHARGE FROM REFUND FOR SENDING THE PARCEL IN THE FIRST INSTANCE. THE PURCHASE OF THIS COMPANY IS CLEARY AN AQUISTION TO REMOVE COMEPTION FROM UK MARKET. SUCH A SHAME AS THIS USED TO BE SUCH A GOOD COMPANY. AVOID AT ALL COSTS!!

Title: Absolutely dreadful
Text: Absolutely dreadful, this clothing is to expensive for the quality, and trying to return for a refund is a nightmare, I was good before the takeover

Title: The Finisterre team were very helpful
Text: The Finisterre team were very helpful, with the end result really reflecting the brand's ethos of sustainability and pride in the quality of their products. The team were also very efficient at replying and easy to communicate with.

Title: Awful. Will not use again.
Text: I placed an order after seeing adds online and social media and was used to know missguided as its own brand, similarly to brands like InTheStyle and PLT. I did not realise that Shein had taken over missguided, which wouldn’t usually worry me until I’ve received my parcel today. I’ve never had an issue when placing an order with Shein or accessing customer service, however I’m unsure how to get through to anyone with missguided. I placed an order consisting of 21 items however only 11 items arrived. They arrived today via evri. The package arrived and appeared to be fine and sealed. The bag was black. I then opened the bag to find another bag inside, with Shein written over it and some of the contents of my parcel inside. I then opened the package and realised the contents was a lot less than expected. I looked on the label which said approx 6.8 kg weight. I then weighed the parcel it was 3kg total meaning nearly 4.8 kg is missing. I am not happy about this. I have contacted missguided and yet to hear anything. I am unable to get through to anyone at evri. I would not recommend at all and I’m now worried where the rest of the contents of my parcel is.

Title: Fantastic customer service; thank you
Text: The brand is great and the clothes are superb but the customer service is even better; i made a mistake but the team were superb (thank you Becky) and sorted out the refund and the issue quickly.

Title: Avoid at all costs
Text: Avoid at all costs! Didn’t realise they had been taken over by Shein or wouldn’t have ordered. Came around 3 weeks after order in a shein bag. Poor quality so returned the other. Absolute farce to return. There isn’t a website facility for this so you have to email, wait for a reply (mine took a week) then return at your own cost through Royal Mail. No refund after a month so I emailed and was asked to provide proof of return. I had misplaced this but refund eventually processed after a lot of back and forth and a screenshot of my Royal Mail transaction through my bank. Joke of a company. AVOID!!

Title: Awful please AVOID…I thought it was the…
Text: Awful please AVOID…I thought it was the missguided I had previously ordered from. Didn’t know it had been taken over by Shein but after taking ages to arrive I now can’t return items. There is no option to return items on the website and customer services have now started replying by saying they are experiencing large volumes of emails and will reply after 72hours. They basically haven’t sent a return label and from the reviews even if returned I probably wouldn’t get a refund. Wish I read the reviews before ordering. Terrible company. Ps the clothes were cheap and horrible also!

Title: I would give 0 stars if possible
Text: I would give 0 stars if possible. Avoid ordering from misguided - SCAM - you will not receive your money back even when you have paid for the return label and returned the items as expected.

Title: Wont refund the three poor quality…
Text: Wont refund the three poor quality items I returned, just keep emailing back with how busy they are and for me to try again in a few days. This company is now owned by sheIn and is awful

Title: Speedy Response on ZEBRA PRINT!!
Text: I was hoping the response would be SURE we can grab a pair of those pink ZEBRA PRINT dungarees from 8 years ago and sell them to you. The person did give me some hope, though. She said, "you never know^.!

Title: Products and Service is Amazing
Text: I couldn’t speak enough about the quality and style of your stuff. Everything I purchased has been amazing. I love buying wool products that fit, are made to last, and are soft. I also need to lift up the kindness and professionalism in customer service. It’s amazing when a company cares and goes above and beyond even in minor issues. It’s clear the culture of the company enables their staff to be creative, flexible, and very cool. Thanks so much.

Title: e just received my order within 4…
Text: I have just received my order within 4 days and the quality and fit of this jumper is fantastic, I would highly recommend this Barents jumper to anyone who wants the best quality and fit, Thank you so much

Title: AVOID DO NOT ORDER
Text: AVOID DO NOT ORDER Ordered £70 worth of clothes. Returned them at my own expense as they were terrible quality and fits. 20 days after the return was signed for by them I’ve still not had a refund and they just keep fobbing me off.

Title: Nimbus Jacket
Text: Recently ordered a jacket and due to a courier error it was never delivered. I reported this to the team at Finisterre who located a replacement and had it sent out that very day. Easily one of the best customer service experiences I’ve ever had. The jacket is first class. Comfy, great fit and responsibly made. I love this brand and will continue to buy from them as my first port of call.

Title: Great Brand
Text: Great Brand. Stylish and really well made clothes and superb customer service.

Title: Excellent customer service
Text: Excellent customer service. Love this brand, clothes and ethics.

Title: They literally took both my money and…
Text: They literally took both my money and my clothes. Mid summer, I bought a bundle of clothes. After deciding which ones I wanted to keep and which I wanted to return, I found out that the returns process was unnecessarily complicated. I had to chase them for five days just to get a return label. Once I finally sent the parcel back - confirmed with full tracking details - they stopped responding completely. It’s now been 53 days without a refund and over a month since they last replied to any of my emails. I’m out more than £200, with no clothes to show for it since I returned them. This is nothing short of a SCAM and an absolute DISGRACE.

Title: Fantastic Stormbird jacket
Text: Stormbird Jacket fantastic, fully waterproof, comfortable and light weight and usual high Finisterre quality.

Title: Don’t waste your time
Text: Don’t waste your time, it’s not the old Missguided, it’s now Shein and the quality certainly reflects that. Returns aren’t free and cost me 7 quid to send back two tops. A joke.

Title: BUYER BEWARE !
Text: Cheap looking,  bad quality clothing. No possibility of a return / refund. Company now run by scammers.

Title: Support Service, Size recommendations
Text: The support service of the Company were extremely kind and helpful! I wanted to change my size last minute because I picked the wrong one and they did that no problem:) Even after I had an additional question they remained very patient! The size change actually worked and today I’ve finally received my dungarees🥰 they are really beautiful and good quality, if you are a bit unsure about the sizes I would recommend the bigger one tho🫶🏻

Title: Stress and hassle.
Text: The order took ages to arrive.  I sent back all the items (either weird or bad material) within 2 days.  I then had to chase for about 1 month to get the refund, prove that I had returned it and waited another 2 weeks for the money. Basically spent $101 dollars, was out of pocket for around 2 months, got stressed, did some hard work, got my refund.  Would NEVER use again and strongly recommend no one else uses them either.  Go directly to Shein, much better service.

Title: Customer service went above and beyond
Text: Customer service went above and beyond, what a breath of fresh air to have such an efficient team dealing with my enquiry. Thank-you so much for replacing my original jacket. I am absolutely blown away by your customer service from start to finish, I have no words really as am not used to this professional and accepting attitude that customer had a problem asked for advice and problem was sorted asap. Thanks so much to all the team..

Title: Very bad experience.first of all they…
Text: Very bad experience.first of all they sell their products without price tag and when u go to return them for xyz reason they refuse to return the item as their was no tag in that.if it’s their policy not to return without tag then why they sell products without price tags.So be aware when buying products.

Title: Just lovely!
Text: Cassie was incredibly helpful and didn’t make any of my questions sound silly or unimportant! Thank you :)

Title: 5 Star Customer Service & Great products
Text: I keep coming back to this company, great quality products that last and amazing customer service. A recent order said delivered, but it wasn’t. I messaged and they immediately dispatched another order. Luckily the original one then arrived and I was able to return the additional one. Very grateful for their prompt help. Have bought swimsuits, neoprene suits and towelling robes over the last couple of years and would definitely recommend.

Title: The absolute worst customer service…
Text: The absolute worst customer service ever! If you buy from them you have to pay for the return if the items don’t fit which costs a fortune. Then communication is a nightmare. The way they process orders and returns is terrible. Takes forever to resolve the situation correctly. Just backwards and not worth the effort.

Title: Great customer service & product
Text: I reached out to Finisterre ahead of a wetsuit purchase to ask for extra information & received helpful, accurate & prompt information on 2 occasions. Superb customer service from Becky. The wetsuit itself is excellent quality and value & was delivered promptly. Wouldn't hesitate to recommend.

Title: Disgraceful!
Text: Disgraceful!! Please don’t purchase from this site! I ordered an item which arrived… unfortunately didn’t like it. Trying to return an item 4 weeks later 2 emails sent & no one helps. Customer service is actually appalling. I will NOT order off this site ever again.

Title: DO NOT USE THIS WEBSITE
Text: DO NOT ORDER FROM HERE. The product is so cheap and for me unwearable. I was also unaware it comes from china and takes a considerable amount of time. The return process is ridiculous you basically have to pay yourself and send a tracking number I had no idea of this and would never have expect that at all. Complete waste of time and money it’s probably going to cost me more to send back than what I paid. I can also now read that even when people send back they haven’t been refunding. Please don’t waste your time.

Title: HUGE THANKS TO AN EXCEPTIONAL TEAM
Text: I want to register my sincere gratitude for Finisterre's exceptional customer service. Rather than shop elsewhere, I am VERY happy I didn't. I rate Finisterre's ethos and values. Their professionalism extends across the business - their shop in Covent Garden, and their repair department. Finisterre's communication and service has been nothing short of exceptional. I love my new Stormbird - just worn it in the rain - and will enjoy it for some considerable time! THANK YOU! 😀

Title: Always solid customer support
Text: I have been a customer for 5 years and my experiences so far have always been great.

Title: Avoid at all costs. Not worth the hassle.
Text: If I could give the new Missguided less than one star I would. The quality of the clothes is awful, sizes are also not true. I have been fighting for a refund for almost two months. I returned two parcels both at the same time with proof of delivery. One I have had a refund for however the more costly parcel I am still waiting and arguing for. AVOID this website at all costs it is not worth the hassle.

Title: 10/10 customer service
Text: The stitching came away at the seam after I had already removed the labels from my skirt. I contacted customer service as the item was no longer in stock to exchange and they gave me a voucher for the full amount of the skirt (I bought mine in the sale) so I could order a full price replacement. Such amazing customer service and responsed really quickly to my email. 10/10 customer service.

Title: Returned an order by post paid for it…
Text: Returned an order by post paid for it to tracked and signed for… As it took them so long to make a refund. I lost my invoice. Apparently they did this to a friend also. Not a good site at all. Never order from them… Returns site is useless!!

Title: L&Y - Friendly, ethical, and always provide excellent customer service
Text: Always second-to-none customer service, helpful, courteous and environmentally conscious! I love this company and everything I've bought from L&Y (approximately half of my wardrobe!) On the rare occasion I've received something imperfect, it's been resolved without issue, the company encourages ethical consumption, keeping products in circulation or returning them as part of the Re-Yak scheme. I've been a fan for many years.

Title: If I should compare the first company…
Text: If I should compare the first company misguided I miss them so much.  The new owners seems to be unreliable. Reviews are one star. If I had read the reviews before, I would not have made my order. It's taking more than a week for shipping. The original misguided was classy and reliable. Won't be shopping here again. I am missing the original misguided so much was once my favorite shopping online store.

Title: Great customer service
Text: Ordered a number of items and didn’t notice until I’d already removed the tag on one of them that some of the stitching had come loose. I saw on their website that returns had to be including tags, so I got in touch with customer service to see if I’d still be able to get a replacement. Got a reply from Ella who offered me several different options including getting a replacement sent out, which she did so speedily. Really appreciate the help and such a quick resolution!

Title: Cheaply made crap!
Text: As others have stated, absolutely do not order from this version of Missguided. They are nothing like the previous brand. The quality is horrendous, cheaply made crap! Avoid, avoid, avoid! These items are not priced to reflect the quality you receive.

Title: Absolute joke of a company
Text: Absolute joke of a company. Scam. Don’t order. I ordered a dress that’s too big and doesn’t suit me. I have sent repeated emails and tried to contact them on social media to get a return sorted and I’ve been completely ignored. Absolute scam. Don’t bother. They should be reported to the Trade Descriptions Act.

Title: If I could give no stars I would
Text: If I could give no stars I would. The customer service or lack off that I have received is shocking. I am still waiting on my refund, it has been over a month. I have escalated it to Resolver. I will be contacting trading standards at my local Council. It is illegal what they are doing. Do not shop with this brand anymore since they have been bought out everything has gone down the pan!

Title: Amazing company, highly recommend
Text: Faultless customer service from Becky and the team. First time shopping with Finisterre and I’m super impressed. Quick delivery, responsive customer services (no AI bots being used here!) and great products. Thank you!

Title: Nearly impossible to return items
Text: Nearly impossible to return items. There is no direct way to do it on the app. You must contact customer service who take unbelievably long to respond. All items on their website can be found for cheaper on SHEIN. I’m not sure what happened to this brand, but it is pretty much over for them. Items take around a week to be delivered as they are coming straight from China.

Title: Not fit for purpose
Text: I ordered 2 dresses and when arrived they were see through and not fit for purpose! I requested a refund and Misguided advised I had to pay for shipping. I paid £4.05 postal tracking to then be debited £2.99 from Misguided for shipping. I have requested the shipping fee to be returned as I have been charged twice!!! I will NOT use this company again. Extremely bad experience and very costly

Title: Full blown Fraud
Text: I ordered clothing items from Missguided, but they were sent in Shein bags, and the items do not match the descriptions provided. Additionally, there have been intentional delays in processing my eligible returns, which contradicts UK consumer laws. This situation has caused me significant distress, as their terms state a 30-day returns policy that they are not honoring. Furthermore, receiving items from Shein instead of Missguided constitutes false advertising, and the products are not as described. This place is completely fraudulent. DO NOT order from them! I’m £100 out of pocket for low-quality Shein clothes, and there is no way to return the items. Citizens Advice informed me that they are operating from outside the UK, so I’m not protected by UK consumer law. Missguided is exploiting this loophole to avoid accepting returns!

Title: Rapid response with correct information…
Text: Rapid response with correct information from customer services. Pleasant and knowledgeable staff in the Cardiff branch with a good understanding of ethical sourcing regarding  environmental and animal welfare issues.

Title: My parcel took 2 weeks to come
Text: My parcel took 2 weeks to come, I am trying to return the item and no return label is issued. I’ve emailed their customer service and completed the contact form on their website 5 times now with no reply! How am I meant to get a refund?! I am now stuck with a dress that does not fit and no way of returning it.

Title: I did some shopping in primark today…
Text: I did some shopping in primark today bought a couple of hoods for winter they were supposed to be on sale one was correctly priced the other which should have been I was charged full price for unfortunatly I did not check the receipt till I got home as the item was bought on a day out it would cost more to go back and complain as this is not the first time I urge everyone check your receipts.

Title: Would give zero stars if I could
Text: Would give zero stars if I could. Customer service it absolutely horrific. Do not order from there unless you want to loose your money. Trading Standards need to close them down

Title: Do not ever order from here!!
Text: Do not ever order from here!!! Absolute scam. The customer services are a joke - despite sending parcel back via royal mail (proof of purchase etc) still haven’t received an email response or refund in over a month. They’re a TERRIBLE company to order from - AVOID AT ALL COSTS!!!!!!

Title: wish i had read the reviews before…
Text: wish i had read the reviews before ordering took ages to come it comes in shein packaging fit awful, you have to pay to return yourself and judging by the other reviews lets see if i get a refund thank goodness I bought off my credit card so all else fails I will get them to sort. DO NOT BUY FROM THEM . At least with shein they make it easy to be able to return things

Title: Disgraceful customer service
Text: Ordered item which took ages to arrive and unfortunately it was not suitable.  Contacted them via email for return label and after 4 attempts I eventually received a return address.  Parcel was returned via Royal Mail with a tracking reference and I have had ongoing issues with them.  Their email advises to contact them if nothing heard within 72 hours which happened 3 times and now today I have been told that they do not recognize the tracking number, totally unacceptable.  Will never order from them again and would advise others to do the same.  I am very angry about this.

Title: Waiting on the return label
Text: I have now completed a return process 3 times and I am still waiting on thelabelno co tact from you at all

Title: Very bad customer service!!
Text: Very bad customer service!!!  Big problem with return order, not contacting, don’t give return address and return label!!!  Very cheap quality. Don’t order nothing from this poor company!!!

Title: I love the Lucy & Yak brand
Text: I love the Lucy & Yak brand. My only gripe is that there are no shops in Ireland. 🥺I’m a loyal customer after first seeing a few celebs wearing the dungarees and then I was hooked. Customer service ( Hannah was who I dealt with) was quick to respond. I would love to see the brand do bedding ♥️ keep up the good work… and keep up the collaborative work. It’s great to see good causes getting some attention and support also. Perhaps a T-shirt collaboration to support the current conflicts in the world…. 🌍 ♥️ A worthwhile project

Title: Not even worth one star
Text: Not even worth one star. Absolute Joke I returned 2 items back in June and they owe me my refund. I have proof they have received my items back. I have sent 8 chase emails one response is sorry we are busy if not responded to in 48 hours to email again. and what a surprise no response. Customer service is totally disgusting and I'm am now out of pocket as I also had to pay to return the items. I would never use this awful company again or recommend anyone to do so.

Title: I wouldn't even give 1 star
Text: I wouldn't even give 1 star. Order took ages to arrive, I wanted to return due to not being suitable. Missguided kept in touch via email for returning but once I returned my order they stopped replying. That's been over a month I've been chasing them and nothing.

Title: The L&Y team got straight back to me
Text: The L&Y team got straight back to me. They were so friendly and kind and offered very generous solutions to my issue. This experience has just furthered my love for the brand and everything they stand for. Thank you for the outstanding customer service and comfort and joy that I get from your clothes. ⭐️⭐️⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

Title: DO NOT ORDER !!!!
Text: DO NOT ORDER !!!! My order came in shein packaging ?? I ordered from missguided I have requested a return on their ' contact us' on their website as this is the only way to do it, I have done this 4 times over 2 weeks have had no reply, you get an automated email saying they are busy but will reply in 72 hours, still NOTHING I have red reviews everywhere that even when you do return the items you do not get a refund I will NEVER order from "missguided" again I am down £££ for 3 dresses that I am stuck with and the quality is AWFUL

Title: Avoid, a matching 2 piece suit isn't reason enough, if one part becomes faulty to get a full refund
Text: I purchased based a 2 piece matching suit from Primark Milton Keynes and the top half was faulty and out of stock so I was given a refund, the bottom half they refused to refund as they said that I could wear it with something else lol. Sadly this came from not 1 but 2 instore managers, so I contacted my bank to do a chargeback and It turns out that if a company refuses to accept a return then you can't get you're money back. The only way around it is to post the item back to the company at a cost of close to £4 as you need a tracking number, to then £5 as the shorts cost £9.

Title: Bad experience that I didn’t read…
Text: Bad experience that I didn’t read reviews earlier I order dress size 12/14 not even fit me bad can’t return have to pay for return avoid this scammer misguided it’s from china take  2 weeks to deliver.

Title: mixed
Text: The returns process felt deliberately fiddly but when I contacted customer services they were very helpful

Title: Good help you if you want to return…
Text: God help you if you want to return everything . I've just had Ann e mail with return details on. It's the only way they will refund me. They have given me a30 refund to have the dress altered ... It was custom made. It's falls to floor it's that bull and far too long and not like picture at all. The 30 seems to be their standard I put a review on. They offered me 10 to take it off. The return has to be made to China. You have to pay all custom charges. It is then not guaranteed they will refund if it doesn't meet there standard which I feel it won't whatever you send. My advise would be don't touch them with a barge pole.

Title: Still waiting almost a month for a refund!
Text: Waiting almost a month for a refund on some returns with ZERO communication from this company.  DO NOT BUY FROM HERE THEIR CUSTOMER SERVICE IS NON-EXISTENT.  Having to now seek legal action

Title: Wouldn't even give one star
Text: Wouldn't even give one star Extremely disappointing and unprofessional. Quality of clothes are cheap and sizes are all over the place. Also difficulties with return, emailed them over and over and still no response with a return label. I will never order from them again!!!

Title: Oh gosh I have been waiting ages for my…
Text: Oh gosh I have been waiting ages for my order to say it is coming from China ! my orders from Shein Missguided have been good quality .  I am now panicking  as I expect poor quality and I go on holiday in a 13 days !! What a poor experience I am so disappointed .

Title: More than satisfactory!
Text: More than satisfactory outcome with an issue I was having with some garments I bought. Thank you for resolving quickly.

Title: The customer service was super quick…
Text: The customer service was super quick and super friendly! Product quality is excellent. Thanks!!

Title: Return
Text: Knowing that patterns and clothing sell out very quickly I bought a pair of dungarees in advance of my daughter's birthday . Unfortunately they were too big. I contacted Lucy and Yak customer service and explained the situation.They very kindly allowed the return even though it was past 30 days and will issue an in-store credit voucher . Much appreciated.

Title: Racists
Text: Racists, I’ve seen nothing but racism displayed from the managers of primark, they have no regard if a customer sees this and feels uncomfortable. They obviously love having control over people and it’s disgusting

Title: Excellent and timely support on an…
Text: Excellent and timely support on an issue I had with a pair of pants.

Title: Excellent quality
Text: Excellent quality. Fantastic customer service support.

Title: A wonderful company
Text: I cannot sing Finisterre’s praises highly enough. I’m 6ft and often struggle to find clothes that fit properly, but Milan in customer service was incredibly helpful – not only answering my detailed emails about measurements, but also going above and beyond by sending me fabric cut-offs so I could have a jumpsuit tailored to fit. They even reimbursed the cost of the alteration. An exceptional company that genuinely puts the customer first. I already loved that they’re a B Corp, but this experience really shows why ethical and sustainable business matters. Thank you again, Finisterre!

Title: Excellent service and communication
Text: Excellent service and communication. I needed to exchange an item and had a deadline to receive the exchange. The email service was fantastic and the new item sent out the same day.

Title: Awesome customer service on top of the quality clothing
Text: I love Finisterre clothing and the brand itself - their ethos particularly around sustainability, and the quality of the materials used that fit that ethos, is the reason I have bought many items from them over many years. Customer service is always really responsive including this time when I contacted them because my discount code wasn’t working. They sorted it out straightaway and I was able to get the items I wanted really quickly as usual!

Title: Amazing customer service
Text: I have had amazing service from all the team at Finisterre. I had a rain jacket that I was concerned about - my husband has the exact same one and his was wearing much better than mine plus he had used his much more. She still told me that I used a different account and card 😤 I even showed her the transaction on my bank account. She’s still telling me that I didn’t use that account l! frustrated and not sure what was going on, I accepted what she was saying and took my items back home with me because the cashier was embarrassing me in front of other customers, I called my bank to find out what was going on and was told that I’d used my Account purchase the items from Primark, after telling my friend what happened to me today she also had the same experience. Please, if anyone else has experienced this, can they tell me because I think it’s a scam from Primark so they don’t have to give you refunds?
